name: Culp for Congress
subject: Big Brother Government says they know what's best.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGlgPH&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EENLI9u&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/0f5219be-34a9-4777-bdf2-e02c3fdc2f7f.png]

Big Brother Government says they know what's best.

Did we step into a time machine back to 2020? Because here we are again staring at universal mask mandates and looming unconstitutional lock downs. The communist Democrat Party claims to be "pro-choice" and yet here they are telling you that you must take the COVID-19 shot because they know what's best for you and if you don't do what they say they'll shut you down. Sounds like gross government abuse to me.

Guess what industries won't be locked down or punished?

You guessed it, companies like Walmart, Amazon, Google, and Apple that weren't shut down in 2020, unlike the small family businesses that desperately tried to survive.

Dan Newhouse and other RINO's like Jaime Herrera Butler gladly took money from those major corporations for their campaigns and lined their pockets while you desperately tried to take care of your families amid all the uncertainty.

Remove the RINO's

As hard as 2020 and coming into 2021 has been we're seeing a great awakening of patriotic Americans stepping up to serve. It also revealed to us the "Republicans" like Newhouse who sell us out for money and power. We don't have to keep dealing with these RINO's because "we the people" hold the power and it is time we let our voices be heard.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/934b2bbe-9471-45e3-8fa3-4ad561cb51bf.jpg]

I'm angry, and I know you are too.

But being angry isn't enough. It's time for action, it's time to take a stand and say, enough. We know our rights and we know when they've been violated. It will take us all working together to get our country back where it should be, in the hands of the American people.

Last cycle we raised $3.3 million in contributions with NO special interest money. Our race sparked a movement inside Washington because we were united in our cause of liberty, freedom, and love of country. This cycle we are going to do it again and send a clear message to Biden, the Democrats, and all the RINO's that Americans are taking their country back.

In order to continue the fight, I need your contributions. Because of your generosity, we're now only a little over $6,000 of hitting our goal for July. We're seeing tyranny unfold but we can stop it together and stand up for America.

I know I can I count on you! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Si1P0H&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9AQMgg&]

Loren

| | **Chief's Brief: July Progress**
---
| | Yesterday, our team sent out a message from my desk making you all aware of the special interest money Dan Newhouse is bringing in by the truckload. Our campaign has begun our grassroots push and you all have not disappointed. Here are the results of the last 24 hours.

**We are only short 49 individual contributors** to reach our goal for July--we've already surpassed June's numbers by 38 donors.
**We are only short $5663** to reach our July fundraising goal.
Last night, we made solid progress, but we still have a ways to go to hit our ultimate goal with approximately 30 hours remaining. The clock is ticking. Let's get this done tonight!
We have never missed a fundraising target since we began our freedom and individual liberty movement in 2019--and July won't be the first time. Look for additional briefings from my desk throughout the day tomorrow to keep you up to date on our progress.
I know I can count on you.
Loren
END BRIEF###

body:

Fellow American,

The end of July is coming up fast and [**I need your help to make sure we hit the ground running.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3b59bac0110441bd887dae7ea789b7c0&_e=r-pyXnYC_1YiKm2yayxiCgE_rCJTldFiiCgMvp3s_SYCiOh_z7nLmkUbdJ0KIoHh91QB2yfaixOLbyzRfe2QVMXmYOEKsl7ZcfsumFeDIDQ-TiE4zqChOhdz7pI6LOv0kJzJidyCTS3Hedxr2aAa80fWbRWq8n_1e7zW23KfX-IJixhG46ydeXtU4jF6Hkigou9Ngo2tUtm6bsQUOwnXIiKHzeEr89KLM4Fmxv2lGEYB2vgrp6VP2OXKmaRWj-Lsc7ycMDgpfiYLmizuIdurU8yrKSsjklsAvQeAj6ZFVoFbixvJ87bYGGahveYubtLMAPDuHBc73roajyQdYfKEFh-bCrVAXogTxPJKBGSEpovvpHy9BUioQHF8v2CIorGbz_Zhmxy5RCX3Cdk2LtaK4w%3D%3D)

This will be my first deadline since announcing my run against Ilhan Omar, and everyone from Mainstream Media to Liberal Super PACs are watching to see if we can compete with the millions Ilhan Omar has raised from the radical Left to prop up her campaign.

**I’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 before midnight on Saturday.** I know with the support of folks just like you, we can send a clear message to the Left.

**Let’s give them something to fear,
Fellow American. **

Let’s show the Left every Republican from across this great nation supports a patriot instead of a hate-spewing radical like Ilhan Omar. [**We can prove that we have what it takes to kick Omar out of Congress and to get our nation back to pursuing the American Dream but need your support before midnight on Saturday.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3b59bac0110441bd887dae7ea789b7c0&_e=r-pyXnYC_1YiKm2yayxiCgE_rCJTldFiiCgMvp3s_SYCiOh_z7nLmkUbdJ0KIoHh91QB2yfaixOLbyzRfe2QVMXmYOEKsl7ZcfsumFeDIDQ-TiE4zqChOhdz7pI6LOv0kJzJidyCTS3Hedxr2aAa80fWbRWq8n_1e7zW23KfX-IJixhG46ydeXtU4jF6HkigK8pEe1dy1VqW4x0M8v1l8gb_K-UEGXA6Xeo0j8DRIeuQZJ30hQNgESRjbYZSyuQ_aKgtBLsWIkus1c44z4MpOye-xHBZ-a4w4ul1AyoSr1Oey5hb_06IFXhButedATCjfJfLYzQmtv6EhWtb5bTOGctCsXslJs-zCdBRDdc41vSS-DZkAR0ZtVJXepQPqcqNmQhrJ6M_rK_8TxR8bDBCug%3D%3D)

[** HELP KICK ILHAN OMAR OUT OF CONGRESS **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3b59bac0110441bd887dae7ea789b7c0&_e=r-pyXnYC_1YiKm2yayxiCgE_rCJTldFiiCgMvp3s_SYCiOh_z7nLmkUbdJ0KIoHh91QB2yfaixOLbyzRfe2QVMXmYOEKsl7ZcfsumFeDIDQ-TiE4zqChOhdz7pI6LOv0kJzJidyCTS3Hedxr2aAa80fWbRWq8n_1e7zW23KfX-IJixhG46ydeXtU4jF6HkigPUmb39REE6JetKnPcleLKYWvoiDOLrGDtBvsrM3TFG4jULryTgAIez9dnJnE2t1TFXyD8DM9E5L5yPVIZC-blRJVz8j4_6-9DJU-by7EwaecMJqyw5WB2f6NilvGkWUYNAebVTITHEM041i02xwJmG0X_UDwbANKAXl4jnC7sAzVrmwrJLd7oi9QaG0ztvAO9tjDjuGrTzdWeR8lWFRhLg%3D%3D)
**_Help me take the fight to Ilhan Omar_** , this is already going to be a tough race, so please don’t sit on the sidelines while I’m in this uphill battle, I can’t make it without your help.

**It takes a community of patriots to stand up to tyranny** , and when a member of Congress like Ilhan Omar praises protests that burn our communities to the ground, then you know we all must make an impact.

**Fellow American, any help you can give – even $5 or $10 – will help us hit our first deadline.**

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Shooting the messenger...yet again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Daniel Hale joins a long line of military whistleblowers—like Daniel Ellsberg, Edward Snowden, Chelsea Manning, and Reality Winner—punished for doing the right thing. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMasnXjI34vYDYUraToqQkQ8NF2ejnyzpy0uMqO0NU0xfFZrx7qrSeIzmftpRBiXo_TW0TLvN9F7bjEOuxXjxIJwW03CgXLwKj-bz95tJmwHNTRlKLT-zTEmPVDSDBPzIvLMLacenoURRDYZx1uQWtoFuNdkzUNtrTqDW5if9cFsEZYxH23QVj6ZiAtOjfO99lty-tQoiH0-l0txUOvRcSEB5qYgpwVhxej0fDPsYdp7wZfEBzzpw2p5D5nAc0NX36dUqAFd18e6k-V5EJuk2bATGw/3e1/SpKt-xpgSRqoEYLlQFhtrw/h0/Yh8pm7igvSxEhj-jxapuJpzHHzijYKuu4rkiEN2UeFE)
| | Dear Peter, On Tuesday, U.S. District Judge Liam O’Grady sentenced military whistleblower Daniel Hale to 45 months in prison for violating the Espionage Act. The Act was supposed to be a tool to use against spies, but his prosecution reflects a growing pattern of the Espionage Act instead being used to silence and villify whistleblowers who expose lies behind closed doors. **[Can you help us get to Washington to stand with future whistleblowers, and help them inform the public about examples of corruption?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5mSXXVi5GptvjtS7ESrtdyNiHg8IO088Ynb5hYL65BLWZYIv10wO2Ffm3vEERCtZkkO2eEnK1AfO1TR7JvNoxq4XBhHyeCotP1hsxGHGsWXN1M05buzmcBTLRMvArStpkzlWzoIjTbMC-Y2K0FDrDcvGZQqB1VYD6TV8cTtGtvsBkEEpyRKAMSEO15zQrSODsUtwx_gaw0SVgFW9UJFwt81QHJNwKIlQ8ml4Y_rwDL1bGAZup8nRhM6oVsKgvf6W1C-J8TNNTKrzgiUUtZpOoL83mJLOQV78jQpj44c27nS3lDU49dm8RUB1AFwsSxp5QsWTDXUdTKV-4VPzSS1t92mQSwLvNDruKIjFR37h4s3kmrv7PFIhYp65FbMhyAMl0/3e1/SpKt-xpgSRqoEYLlQFhtrw/h1/Wkka8Fl2yLgr9rqrHsH1j8OKeI54l3BwRpdfqp2Vxt4)** Washington has a long habit of rewarding institutional crime and shooting the messengers. Ellsberg, Binney, Manning, Assange, Snowden, Winner—and now Hale—each demonstrate a pattern spanning generations. Each of those courageous public servants chose to inform the public about lies behind closed doors. They stand in sharp contrast from the officials—from each of the corporate political parties—who instead silenced them to serve their own institutions, and their careers, at the expense of both the public and our nation’s stated principles. Hale is the latest in a long line of public servants who our nation will punish for doing the right thing. He noted in the court how ‘You had to kill part of your conscience to keep doing your job,’ and—like other whistleblowers—made a profound sacrifice to inform the public. **[Informing the public often exposes we truth tellers to retaliation. But whatever the price, we’re proud to have stood against the establishment and to have supported whistleblowers in many settings. Can you stand with us before the end of this month?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5mSXXVi5GptvjtS7ESrtdyNiHg8IO088Ynb5hYL65BLWxstPm5B8ukANxktjXpEUPYhmnh0cHcvZC48KqrSxbHlWTxiITBX8IXljw07Q-1wfM6uOBZ4oq-CQNWEehTzkBQe4AeywX_95K-lTYbGwOtrvIdxz1U9A3rAGMEZqTHkHQkm0II2JlRaUbfZslauJ9EJEtSCEgNe23S-5OP2Xl4XcBgIcOcDs_0-YQwzC_neHJPv7eI7E0VUDNVEjZASHXlF0XtPcAfL8sdMIlPVQkVSRfPI5NktuVj8SVI72es7i5ZOH7f51U_0w6Cs5pRYIEQdxuM0fxYDl4VNjW44TtabpCqlGd-gsAEj6CwLUA9ef3F5kG5uvHdDUxy9zTxQ9M/3e1/SpKt-xpgSRqoEYLlQFhtrw/h2/0XtBin-WBUvGgDUCg0sKZRBwoPpqeodoSqtL6yJa9qs)** One reason I’m running for Congress is because the powerful incumbent who represents my city in Washington has long deferred to executive secrecy. Transparency is a constitutional value that stands above politics. But politics can undermine it, nonetheless, as it has today. Hale deserves a medal, not a prison sentence. All whistleblowers, and the people of the United States, deserve policymakers in the mold of the late Sen. Mike Gravel (D-AK) willing to fulfill the oath of office by standing alongside them. **[Can you join us today to help force long overdue transparency and accountability on Washington? We’re eager to do the job that our predecessors haven’t, but lacking the backing of either a political party or a corporate lobby, we’re entirely reliant on grassroots—your—support.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5mSXXVi5GptvjtS7ESrtdyNiHg8IO088Ynb5hYL65BLXHSzPn3bEkSB496F8HzQHlpmiVjW5EW9gfBwHNNWBTQt1FkGZiWQjUoVX_JD5YI-WNpdGYJToBtdvyn7XaBL0YzxrsVFf3pfNxV12pPiRK2p9r7eo8RymNLICIJSagggtIlVm6HMwq7sVJrWC7ql4VT1atJtp11nZcTlXWAZvPhOfmafGPLvUqiPVZzHnZpO6PdW_QtDrKozZxV_tafJXSNBWpCF-P5u4IfOtTlhxVUZFjUfhfP-t6lw_nG-q_WaUYBdtuDaDb6M8igQ2yy7W2TIFx7LNcJsLSZdzmLys6hz3gDG6rWONQ-m2pKcaTMXEo6GhAOkUGPx8iFWLt0ife/3e1/SpKt-xpgSRqoEYLlQFhtrw/h3/k3vMn6o2U8ePjRueFEdV5HG3-JvzWihbLOJspKYhjhc)** Thank you so much for your help! Shahid |

clean_body: Daniel Hale joins a long line of military whistleblowers—like Daniel Ellsberg, Edward Snowden, Chelsea Manning, and Reality Winner—punished for doing the right thing. | | | | | Dear Peter, On Tuesday, U.S. District Judge Liam O’Grady sentenced military whistleblower Daniel Hale to 45 months in prison for violating the Espionage Act. The Act was supposed to be a tool to use against spies, but his prosecution reflects a growing pattern of the Espionage Act instead being used to silence and villify whistleblowers who expose lies behind closed doors. Washington has a long habit of rewarding institutional crime and shooting the messengers. Ellsberg, Binney, Manning, Assange, Snowden, Winner—and now Hale—each demonstrate a pattern spanning generations. Each of those courageous public servants chose to inform the public about lies behind closed doors. They stand in sharp contrast from the officials—from each of the corporate political parties—who instead silenced them to serve their own institutions, and their careers, at the expense of both the public and our nation’s stated principles. Hale is the latest in a long line of public servants who our nation will punish for doing the right thing. He noted in the court how ‘You had to kill part of your conscience to keep doing your job,’ and—like other whistleblowers—made a profound sacrifice to inform the public. One reason I’m running for Congress is because the powerful incumbent who represents my city in Washington has long deferred to executive secrecy. Transparency is a constitutional value that stands above politics. But politics can undermine it, nonetheless, as it has today. Hale deserves a medal, not a prison sentence. All whistleblowers, and the people of the United States, deserve policymakers in the mold of the late Sen. Mike Gravel (D-AK) willing to fulfill the oath of office by standing alongside them. Thank you so much for your help! Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Shahid for Change, please .

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Peter, We Just Beat the Democrats
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_just_beat_the_democrats&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You are the first to hear this... **Many months ago, the Minnesota Democrat Party hired a big law firm to go after us for putting pressure on Democrat legislators who voted to protect Walz' Emergency Powers. They levied a baseless complaint with the Campaign Finance Board, asserting we were not following the laws and trying to directly influence elections.** Influence elections? This isn't even an election year. What we were doing is contacting constituents to tell them how their legislator is voting on Walz' Emergency Powers. And it was clearly effective! Baseless, false claims are what the Democrats know best. This is the Minnesota Democrat's version of a Russia, Russia, Russia hoax! They wanted to DESTROY us. They wanted YOU to lose your voice at the Capitol, so Walz' biggest adversary would go away. But guess what...It didn't work!!! **The Campaign Finance Board[just dismissed the baseless claim](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_s_fake_complaint_against_us_dismissed_by_cfb?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_just_beat_the_democrats&n=2) against Action 4 Liberty.**
## We Beat the Democrats!
Let's be honest what is behind all of this. The Democrats did this to scare us away. They wanted us to STOP bringing pressure against their weakest members. And they assumed it would work because they are used to Republicans who constantly cower to them. But we're something completely different. We don't back down. We take the fight to them. And because of your support, we have the ability to carry on the mission. **Please continue supporting the one group in Minnesota who does not back down to the Democrats and Radical Left!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_just_beat_the_democrats&n=3 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_just_beat_the_democrats&n=3)
---
Peter, I'm sure you can tell we are completely different than other political groups in this state. We don't just talk differently, we show up and do what we say we're going to do.
_The media is creating a whole new fear campaign over the Delta variant. And Governor Walz is threatening to unilaterally declare new Emergency Powers to create a second mask mandate._
You see, this is why the Democrats tried derailing us. They don't want anyone in the way of their Governor having unlimited, Unilateral Emergency Powers again.
We REFUSE to give up. And we will fight these tyrants who want to take away our rights!
**Peter, don't let the Democrats and Radical Left win.[Donate $25, $50 or $100 to make sure Action 4 Liberty's growing team remains in the fight for your liberties.](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_just_beat_the_democrats&n=4)**
**In Liberty,**
****

clean_body: we need your help: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Dr. Ruiz is facing a critical fundraising deadline on Saturday -- They know how much is on the line with our Democratic Majority. | | | | | | | | Listen, we HAVE to protect Dr. Ruiz and our House Majority from far-right Republicans! Joe Biden is counting on Democrats like Dr. Ruiz WINNING ↘ But Dr. Ruiz doesn’t stand a chance without your help. | | | | | | Thank you for FIGHTING with us, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040098:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040097:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040099:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040100:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040101:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58040102:JRC6GXlLN:m:1:3253819041:74FA1EACF84650ADC24C3DFD3F74404D:r)
---|---|---

As Charlie's finance director, it's my job to make sure our team has the resources we need to run a successful campaign to win this primary and make Ron DeSantis a one-term governor.

**So when I tell Charlie that I 've set a $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, that number isn't arbitrary -- it's based on what I _know_ we'll need to get the job done.**

Your grassroots donations are what will make it possible for us to:
* 🚘 Travel to _every corner of the Sunshine state_ to reach voters where they are.
* 🏃♀️ Build an _unstoppable organizing force_ in every corner of the state to register voters, mobilize them, and get them to the polls.
* 📣 _Get the word out_ about Charlie's message of building a Florida for All.

**[Folks like you are the ones who make all of this possible, which is why I'm asking you to chip in before our critical end-of-month deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ah4Xjd8bKZH2-LRkTbNqAw==/vEHrkTJWv_T19uALKnEn8g==?refcode=20210730_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Beating Gov. DeSantis is not going to be easy, so hitting these monthly deadlines now is so important to ensure we're on the right track. **[I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: Can I count on you to donate now so we can hit our $15,000 goal and build a winning campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ah4Xjd8bKZH2-LRkTbNqAw==/vEHrkTJWv_T19uALKnEn8g==?refcode=20210730_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Thank you!

\-- Evan

name: Val Demings
subject: please, friend

name: David Bowes, Never Again PAC
subject: We can win.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Next year's elections will be crucial to the future of our democracy. It's not enough that we maintain our slim Democratic majorities in the House and Senate -- we've already seen that Republicans will filibuster any legislation to protect our democracy. Instead, we need to defeat the Treason Caucus and replace them with leaders who will fight for democracy protections. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33223823/298228810/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNzFhZjE2LTM2ZjEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Li5JU0Vs7VavSsclS-Z5CflTYs5FBQE-Ifm-HGC2H8w=&emci=4f1fc19d-90f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f71af16-36f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

Next year's elections will be crucial to the future of our democracy.

It's not enough that we maintain our slim Democratic majorities in the House and Senate -- we've already seen that Republicans will filibuster any legislation to protect our democracy. Instead, we need to defeat the Treason Caucus and replace them with leaders who will fight for democracy protections.

It won't be an easy task. In fact, many critics already want to write off next year as a Republican victory. Despite what they're saying, I know that _we can_ defeat the Treason Caucus. Rep. Scott Perry's district is in a state that was carried by Joe Biden and he was re-elected by just six points. Rep. Mike Garcia won by just 333 votes. In Texas, Rep. Beth Van Duyne defeated her Democratic opponent by 1.3%.

I could go on, but the point is: **if we work hard and work together, we can win.**

By keeping the pressure on the Treason Caucus from now until the midterm elections, we can ensure their constituents don't forget their attacks on our democracy or the events of January 6. But we can't do this work alone -- we need your support right away if we're going to hold these dangerous Republicans accountable for their attacks on our democracy.

**[Will you join us? Chip in before our end-of-month deadline to help us lay the groundwork to defeat the Treason Caucus in 2022.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33223825/298228812/975632184?gpsid=8_30_19972&refcode=em21_210730_eom3_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210730_eom3_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNzFhZjE2LTM2ZjEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Li5JU0Vs7VavSsclS-Z5CflTYs5FBQE-Ifm-HGC2H8w=)**

Thank you,

David

David Bowes
Co-founder & Executive Director
Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33223827/298228814/975632184?gpsid=8_30_19972&refcode=em21_210730_eom3_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210730_eom3_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNzFhZjE2LTM2ZjEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Li5JU0Vs7VavSsclS-Z5CflTYs5FBQE-Ifm-HGC2H8w=)

Peter,
As Chair of the Tennessee Democratic Party, I'm responsible for making tough calls on how to allocate resources to support our organizing efforts. This is crucial in our fight against the Republican supermajority in our state legislature.
Tomorrow is our end of the month deadline. After midnight tomorrow night, I'm going to know exactly where we stand as we structure our plans for next year.
Can you rush a donation and help us raise the $7,843 we need to fund our organizing efforts across the state? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden supports Slavery
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "Headline") Peter, Joe Biden is a coward. China is profiting from Slave Labor, and he is too weak to confront them. His Climate Czar John Kerry calls it "forced labor," but I am not afraid of the Chinese Government--**_so I will call it slave labor_** --that's what it is after all when work camps are filled with slaves making products to ship overseas. And Joe Biden's response is to sanction a Chinese solar company in response while thousands of people are being abused so China can make goods at lower prices than we can make them here in the United States. Slavery, genocide, torture, religious persecution - all of them are vital parts of the Chinese regime, and Joe Biden is too weak to call them out for it. I'm not afraid to call evil what it is or to hold Joe Biden accountable for abandoning our post as a moral leader in the world. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "Tweet")**[America needs to continue being a shining light of freedom for the world, and we cannot fulfill that mission if we are so afraid of upsetting a Communist government that has no problem sending us a deadly virus, manipulating its currency, or being so vile as to use slaves to make their products.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "America needs to continue being a shining light of freedom for the
world, and we cannot fulfill that mission if we are so afraid of upsetting a Communist government that has no problem sending us a deadly virus,
manipulating its currency, or being so vile as to use slaves to make their products.")** Biden isn't just afraid of the Chinese - he also has to contend with the green energy lobbyists who stand to lose millions if they can't manufacture solar panels in China. Unfortunately, this administration is more concerned with appeasing the radical proponents of the Green New Deal than they are with fighting genocide and slavery. **_Read that sentence again_** - Joe Biden is willing to look the other way as China enslaves people if it helps him appease his Party. If Joe Biden refuses to be the moral leader our times demand, then it is up to you and me to take the lead. **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even just $25 will give me what I need to stand up for the moral fight of our time.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031961:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "Your donation of
$1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even just $25 will give me what I need to stand up for the moral fight of our time.")** So often in Washington, D.C. these days, doing the right thing is so unpopular. But, you know me. That has never bothered me. I'm still fighting for freedom, for our moral convictions like our Founding Fathers, and I won't stop until we win. _" The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it."
- John 1:5_ **[Please stand with me TODAY, and let's show Joe Biden we still have a moral compass.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "Please stand with
me TODAY, and let’s show Joe Biden we still have a moral compass.")** For America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "Josh
Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58031960:6IuEwXlNu:m:1:3103520637:C27B80011F3DB1DECC8E70E7B29F726F:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

Friend, In November 2022, Ras can make history by becoming the next Governor of Iowa — leading us by being bold about the basics and working to build a state that helps each and every one of us thrive. As a state legislator, Ras has proven time and again that he gets the job done for Iowans — whether it’s advocating for our kids and public schools, leading the way in the unanimous passage of the Plan for a More Perfect Union, or working to create better-paying jobs and career opportunities so young people will stay and be proud to call Iowa home. _That’s why leaders across the state are supporting Ras in this critical race for Governor._ So far, he’s received endorsements from **State Representatives Timi Brown-Powers (HD-61) in Waterloo, Dave Williams (HD-60) in Cedar Falls, and Charlie McConkey (HD-15) in Council Bluffs**. All three of these Iowan leaders have seen first-hand what Ras can do for the people of this state, and know he’s the best choice to take on Governor Kim Reynolds and lead Iowa into the future. clean_body: In November 2022, Ras can make history by becoming the next Governor of Iowa -- leading us by being bold about the basics and working to build a state that helps each and every one of us thrive. | = Friend, In November 2022, Ras can make history by becoming the next Governor of Iowa — leading us by being bold about the basics and working to build a state that helps each and every one of us thrive. As a state legislator, Ras has proven time and again that he gets the job done for Iowans — whether it’s advocating for our kids and public schools, leading the way in the unanimous passage of the Plan for a More Perfect Union, or working to create better-paying jobs and career opportunities so young people will stay and be proud to call Iowa home. That’s why leaders across the state are supporting Ras in this critical race for Governor. So far, he’s received endorsements from State Representatives Timi Brown-Powers (HD-61) in Waterloo, Dave Williams (HD-60) in Cedar Falls, and Charlie McConkey (HD-15) in Council Bluffs. All three of these Iowan leaders have seen first-hand what Ras can do for the people of this state, and know he’s the best choice to take on Governor Kim Reynolds and lead Iowa into the future. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = If we can continue to build on this momentum, we can get Ras on the ballot and ultimately send him to represent every Iowan as our next Governor. — Team Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. name: Marissa Tully
subject: Here’s what we know
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interest GOP donors who want him to run for President in 2024
body:
Friends—

Plenty of campaigns are asking for your support this week in advance of tomorrow’s deadline, so we owe you an explanation.

Here’s why your donation to Nikki’s campaign is so important.

Ron DeSantis is raising millions from Republican megadonors across the country. Last month, only half of his donations came from Floridians. He’s bought and paid for by special interest GOP donors who want him to run for President in 2024.

Nikki is the only candidate who can defeat DeSantis next year. She’s the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. She’s beat the odds before, and I know she can do it again.

Team, by supporting our campaign, you’re investing in a movement that can beat Ron DeSantis—and you’re helping us compete with his money machine. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom?refcode=fri]

Thanks for fighting by our side. Together, we’re going to win next year.

Marissa Tully

Deputy Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Tony Vargas
subject: Reminder: Campaign Kickoff tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
Join me for a packed day of action this Saturday where we'll be officially kicking off my campaign, marching in a parade, and talking to voters!

|
---

| |
---
Hi Friend -- Just wanted to send a quick reminder about our very first Day of Action tomorrow! We will be in the [Native Omaha Days Parade](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33237990/298263032/-168854696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VlOGJkNC00M2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUZ_OA2Av3JRytEc2-p2FSNkmB-OBfRtzhVs0K-bHeE=&emci=5edf4c16-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f7ee8bd4-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=19927889) in the morning and then will be officially [kicking off my campaign at an event at Turner Park at Midtown Crossing](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33237991/298263033/-229921931?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VlOGJkNC00M2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUZ_OA2Av3JRytEc2-p2FSNkmB-OBfRtzhVs0K-bHeE=&emci=5edf4c16-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f7ee8bd4-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=19927889). More details below.

Hope to see you there!

_\- Tony_

* * *
I'm so excited to be running to represent Nebraskans in Congress and even more excited to officially get things kicked off with our very first Day of Action _**this Saturday, July 31**_!

There are two big events and I'd love to see you at one or both of them. We'll begin the day by marching in the Native Omaha Days Parade and then we'll be holding my official campaign kickoff right afterwards. RSVP by clicking on the images below --
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33237992/298263034/-168854696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VlOGJkNC00M2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUZ_OA2Av3JRytEc2-p2FSNkmB-OBfRtzhVs0K-bHeE=&emci=5edf4c16-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f7ee8bd4-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=19927889) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33237993/298263035/-229921931?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VlOGJkNC00M2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUZ_OA2Av3JRytEc2-p2FSNkmB-OBfRtzhVs0K-bHeE=&emci=5edf4c16-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f7ee8bd4-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=19927889) Talking to voters is my _favorite_ thing about campaigning and I'm so excited to get started this weekend.

Hope to see you on Saturday, _Tony _

---

To make matters EVEN WORSE , I just got word from House Republicans that they are about to fall critically short of their biggest fundraising deadline this year... If Republicans fail and miss this deadline, the consequences could be unthinkable. I'm asking for your support right now, Peter. ** I'm supporting a team of top GOP leaders before Democrats overwhelm us in must-win swing states. Mike Pence messaged you... Donald Trump Jr. messaged you... Kevin McCarthy messaged you... Newt Gingrich messaged you... Elise Stefanik messaged you... Steve Scalise messaged you... | | Peter, I can’t wait for Jasmine’s mini-golf fundraiser on Saturday. Mostly because I’m planning to win our family game of mini-golf. For the record, Jasmine and our son, Cal, are also planning to win. But I will prevail. You could say we have a healthy competitive streak as a family. But tomorrow, her opponent, Madison Cawthorn, will raise hundreds of thousands of dollars at an upper-crust fundraiser at Trump’s New Jersey golf course. **Cawthorn must not have gotten the memo -- I’m the only one who gets to win against Jasmine![Will you chip in $25 to help my wife meet her July fundraising goal and defeat Cawthorn in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33241291/298277366/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210730_FR_EOM4MyWife_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWJmMWMwNC00YmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3nVX6HH2pyfR5hrR7dwQavQb3gDafUbx9BQvJPxynY=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33241292/298277367/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210730_FR_EOM4MyWife_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWJmMWMwNC00YmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3nVX6HH2pyfR5hrR7dwQavQb3gDafUbx9BQvJPxynY=)

Let me back up a little bit.
Jasmine is my wife, and I love her very much. And part of what I love is her competitive streak.
For one of our very first dates, we ran an adventure race together. Jasmine and her friends had formed a team several years in a row, and let’s just say that, despite Jasmine’s competitive instincts, they weren’t winning any trophies...
(As in: our team name might have been inspired by a donut.)
I had just moved to town and was surreptitiously assigned to Jasmine’s team by a mutual friend turned matchmaker. I was in the midst of my soccer career and training seriously at that point.
**I wish I could say we walked away with the trophy. Instead, we got lost and they had to send a search party for us.**
I’d never laughed so much as I did that day. That’s when I knew Jasmine was special -- not only because she made getting lost a great time, but because I could see that when she really set her mind to something more serious than a fun run, she wouldn’t quit until she achieved it.
I saw that drive in action when she launched the Campaign for Southern Equality and helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi. Then again when she ran for County Commissioner and won, even when most pundits said she didn’t stand a chance. Then again when she built bipartisan coalitions to pass progressive policies for Western North Carolina.
**When it comes to grassroots organizing, Jasmine will overcome any obstacle in her way to achieve what’s right and deliver results.**
[**Jasmine’s putting that drive into action right now as she runs to be the compassionate, effective Congresswoman that NC-11 deserves. Will you chip in to help my wife beat the odds once again?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33241293/298277368/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210730_FR_EOM4MyWife_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWJmMWMwNC00YmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3nVX6HH2pyfR5hrR7dwQavQb3gDafUbx9BQvJPxynY=)

I saw that drive in action when she launched the Campaign for Southern Equality and helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi. Then again when she ran for County Commissioner and won, even when most pundits said she didn’t stand a chance. Then again when she built bipartisan coalitions to pass progressive policies for Western North Carolina. When it comes to grassroots organizing, Jasmine will overcome any obstacle in her way to achieve what’s right and deliver results. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Now back to working on my mini-golf swing, Meghann = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . _We can’t believe it either 𑁋 July is almost over!_ _Start August strong with some live trainings that will make campaigning a breeze.__
__Or at least less hurricane-like, anyway._ 💨

****
**The latest installment of Trainer Talks is happening TODAY 𑁋 register now to hear from three expert trainers about building and leading strong GOTV efforts._RSVP now!_
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..S1uGzySpn-Cyh_H-gXvpgOoQuFUguMNQZJ4stidX7yw)

[**Do You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v6XRtwZ9TQZcDTl8Q3pSYUVGBK22arvF8RzIrCkz_5s)
**Monday, August 2, 1pm ET****

**Arizona is GROUND ZERO in the fight for our democracy, and the GOP's worst extremists are already teaming up to keep this battleground state red.[If you're with us, will you give $5 or more before midnight tonight to help us hit our end-of-month goal, defeat GOP extremism and defend our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243510/298287066/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243511/298287067/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)
Friend, Arizona has had enough failed leadership from Republicans like **Doug Ducey** and **Kelli Ward**. Instead of tackling the real challenges facing working people, they've been pushing the same lies and conspiracy theories that led to the Jan. 6 Capitol insurrection – and they've welcomed the worst of the GOP into our state to help them.

First, the Arizona GOP brought in QAnon conspiracy theorists **Marjorie Taylor Greene** and **Matt Gaetz** to defend their sham "election audit" and try to overturn the 2020 election. Then failed presidential candidate **Ted Cruz** endorsed Marco's Republican opponent in this governor's race – and failed former _president_ **Donald Trump** just held a rally in Arizona to double down on all the GOP's lies and keep our battleground state red!
This dangerous series of events – from a sham "election audit" to restrictive voter suppression – could lead, as Rachel Maddow warns, to the "END OF DEMOCRACY." And with POLITICO reporting that Republicans will be spending MILLIONS to keep Arizona red and continue pushing their extremist agenda, we need an immediate surge of grassroots support to stop them.

**[The ONLY way to fight back is by kicking them out of power and electing a Democratic governor – and we know Marco Lopez is the Democrat for the job. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243512/298287068/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)****[That's why our end-of-month goal is so critical – but with time running out before our deadline, we're still falling short. Please, will you rush a donation right now – before time runs out on our deadline – to defeat dangerous GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243513/298287069/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243514/298287070/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)

Your support is critical to this fight.

– Team Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243518/298287077/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243519/298287102/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33243520/298287103/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQzNDVlOS00ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8Dn591oAO-2sKwh9Q3IYio7BL_33jXstPneo5AJa8=)

Stefanik made the truly bizarre and unfounded claim that Pelosi somehow “bears responsibility as speaker of the House for the tragedy that occurred on Jan. 6.” Stefanik's blatant politicking is frankly insulting, Peter. Republicans have gotten so comfortable warping their base's perception of reality that now they think the same tricks will work on us. Well, Peter, we've got news for the GOP: The propaganda party is over. | = Progressives see this disinformation campaign for what it is: an obvious attack on our bold Democrat investigators. Nancy Pelosi's Democrat appointees have bravely taken on the difficult task of uncovering the truth about how the far-right insurrection at the Capitol happened. Meanwhile, Republican obstructionists like Elise Stefanik are setting up press conferences around the clock to distract the American people. Enough is enough, Peter. We deserve to know the truth. If you agree that Nancy Pelosi's investigators should be allowed to do their job, then we need your help. When Democrats Turn Out is leading a nationwide pressure campaign to unseat these cynical, dangerous Republicans and replace them with bold progressives who will actually defend our values. But the battle has never been tougher, Peter, and we need all the help we can get. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Nancy Pelosi and our fearless Democrat investigators are counting on us, Peter. Thank you for showing them that we have their backs. \- When Democrats Turn Out = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Let's fix Congress so we can deliver more results to the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
This month, President Joe Biden's Child Tax Credit went into effect. It will help lift millions of children out of poverty -- including countless families in our region.

This is a huge deal, Peter. Passing big, bold policies through Congress is a rare occurrence these days, **but it wasn 't always that way.**

Fifty-six years ago today, the Social Security Act Amendments were signed into law, establishing Medicare and Medicaid. These programs have become such vitally important parts of our country -- so critical to providing health care -- it's hard to imagine what it was like before they existed.

**Medicare and Medicaid are the kind of big, bold things we can accomplish when Congress gets stuff done. There 's too much gridlock and partisan bickering in Washington D.C., and not enough focus on delivering results to the American people. I'm working hard to change all of that because I didn't run for office to score cheap political points: _I ran to get stuff done._ **

Right now, as Chair of the House Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress, I'm working to fix Congress so it can get more things done -- big, bold things like Medicare and Medicaid and the expanded Child Tax Credit -- because that's what the American people deserve.

That's what my committee is all about. I'm committed to doing whatever it takes to break the gridlock and get Congress back to working for the people.

**[Change requires us doing something different, Peter, and I'm ready to make change. If you're with me, donate to my campaign today before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to support our fight for the people.](https://act.myngp.com/el/10V8dAihCI1JD4i_taCwTP5q87mwWgVbC1gMO_imNUM=/wQYmlos1f48_x2gTS4T3oS0JHEovw9QQneCkjkH8Rjg=?gpsid=39_115_19973&refcode=em21_210730_med_fnd_gq_act_v1_dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210730_med_fnd_gq_act_v1_dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Suggested donation: $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**July End-of-Month Fundraising Deadline
Goal:** $14,000
**Deadline:** 7/31
**Suggested Donation:** $5
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33245579/298295220/-748347061?refcode2=fbf28874-54f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210730-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODg3NC01NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VEDuTX7KJp05B2_ABZLI_FHhECOuqR5LjrK8IPvdaM=)**
I’m reaching out to ask if you can make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help my team and I hit our July end-of-month goal.
We’ve set an ambitious goal of $14,000, so any amount you can give will go a long way. If you’re already ready to make that contribution, **[you can do so here,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33245581/298295222/-748347061?refcode2=fbf28874-54f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210730-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODg3NC01NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VEDuTX7KJp05B2_ABZLI_FHhECOuqR5LjrK8IPvdaM=)** but if you’d like to hear more first, please keep reading.
My progressive colleagues and I are beginning to make progress on a number of issues that will improve the lives of working Americans. Just recently, I introduced the Inclusive Elections Act, which will restore the portion of the Voting Rights Act that the Supreme Court dismantled in its recent decision.
And the rollout of the child tax credit - which my Democratic colleagues I fought to include in the American Rescue Plan - has been an enormous success.
**But the truth is we still have a long way to go. Many of the legislative priorities I’m fighting for won’t be possible if we don’t abolish the filibuster. And we’re going up against a lot of resistance, both from Republicans and a few members of our own party.**
Our movement has a lot of work to do, and I am working overtime to get it done.
But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary and Republican challengers. Last cycle, the field included several self-funded candidates trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again.
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our ambitious end-of-month goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities in Congress, not fundraising for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33245583/298295224/-748347061?refcode2=fbf28874-54f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210730-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODg3NC01NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VEDuTX7KJp05B2_ABZLI_FHhECOuqR5LjrK8IPvdaM=)**
Thank you, as always, for your ongoing support. It truly means so much.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33245589/298295226/-748347061?refcode2=fbf28874-54f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210730-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODg3NC01NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VEDuTX7KJp05B2_ABZLI_FHhECOuqR5LjrK8IPvdaM=)**

subject: Radical progressives are coming for Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2cf9dc2ddc44aa3badae5325ec994ca&_e=zr6uD8i7Xn_qPXjsbUzcj9PxyL8IDNNJjwHC0iF83btzkXYwDXyv15UQEzt-nCTsi3QztrsT3i6qCYFkM8q3OZ_Vc9iWsvvkmPEhYp06FHT21FaHW-akwWt-xepO8FQaDxFz2f6S966gltMFsAp6fPS_oNP4OM1hVHgKjqOE8SjE1v0kZLjKGL0TTTK6RniR--WSV9bXUTayrQVOehxMgOfeRSHYGPL2aQ4l3u0j4gBvfhOoqGaX1tF0JKYxvmbn660jdPgu6TSDLnVm9hEJ_PqNi5uUZ9il_HkifRph3s0%3D)

**Radical Progressives Are Coming For Tennessee**
Dear Friend,
My opponent recently announced his run for Congress, and he is already promoting his radical agenda.
[**Help Me Fight Back >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2cf9dc2ddc44aa3badae5325ec994ca&_e=zr6uD8i7Xn_qPXjsbUzcj9PxyL8IDNNJjwHC0iF83btzkXYwDXyv15UQEzt-nCTsi3QztrsT3i6qCYFkM8q3OXzvqgBE_NUW8TULTyKHm0iCQATlvFFnvaNL3My5cvhZ6V7iGi1DKit6ZsV37CXSMcFKn5QFTYu3KHVU9b39KaUBBkZwc0MATqONqrnLQk9wnSPUHq_3Zi_SP9Jd3Y9WHhks63K-FYLkLntKKYPx3dHY7addvYndqHixH30U-Zm0wh_li6dBRil2j9DgcvZJgYQ7DYl3aytewY2oRQG7XHc%3D)
Make no mistake, East Tennessee doesn’t want:

❌ Socialized healthcare
❌ Student loan forgiveness
❌ Job-killing Green New Deal policies

We want to make our own healthcare decisions, keep our hard-earned dollars, and run our businesses free from government intervention and our schools free from liberal indoctrination.

My opponent doesn’t understand that. The worst part is, he is attacking me for defending the very values this district elected me to uphold.

I need your help to show him radical progressive policies aren't welcome here.
[**Show Radical Progressives The Door >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c2cf9dc2ddc44aa3badae5325ec994ca&_e=zr6uD8i7Xn_qPXjsbUzcj9PxyL8IDNNJjwHC0iF83btzkXYwDXyv15UQEzt-nCTsi3QztrsT3i6qCYFkM8q3OaijDyW7Pu0YV2w5d2vtUV5PAei7QLFJ5OX6Eotf3WqonDC08gAsS3AVnuc3qfeMGFShKrZLFDalidZC69YexGJpW1CFnovz8DISzF6Zp-vuuzroTcfnGXcCb7PYMy6mLKUyScDwgRaTc9OaLcU7pzrpTlh3LeBa36YwvnFNs7OpJohy8Wchc8D9F7BK7PLKxnQ5ttEMc_owKzvFP15zbvk%3D)
**We want to make sure we do everything in our power to defend this seat and keep it red. **

| | Friend,
I’m worried.

We cannot afford another two years of Abigail Spanberger as our Congresswoman. She was against the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, has called for an updated Federal Assault Weapons Ban and voted for President Trump’s impeachment. Who knows what radical idea she will bring next?

Spanberger has put our lives in constant danger and I’m concerned.

When Spanberger and the Democrats have had continued calls for defunding the police, open borders, and more wasteful spending. It concerns me for the future of our nation.
**Which is why I support Tina Ramirez for Congress.**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 36 hours. $8,669 to go to support veterans of integrity for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Did you know that there are only 4 women veterans serving in the US House of Representatives right now? Is that acceptable to you? [_**It 's not to me.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=)

The biggest hurdle women veterans - and all veterans and military family members - face when running for Congress is [_**fundraising.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=) We lose so many promising candidates because there is so much dark money in our politics that the good ones don't feel like they can raise enough to compete.

[_**Now is the time to have their backs.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=)

We are about to end our candidate recruitment for the 2022 cycle. [_**We need to raise $8,669 before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight to show our prospective candidates that we have the financial support to help them win. Can you chip in today to help us?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=) This can be the difference between whether a good candidate has the confidence to step up and run for office or not. And in 2022, [_**every seat counts as we work to hold the House and Senate!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=)

This is the most critical period for our fundraising - the time when your hard-earned dollars can do the most good. [_**Please join me in giving as much as you can!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xlXHwOWf8etpEvjfFcYQn_evi61aPXsqUQhbI0tw6Hk=)

Forever grateful,
Patrick

_Patrick J. Murphy_
_32nd Under Secretary of the Army_
_Former Congressman (PA-01)
_[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/ldT_uaq5UAlY7F0od1jObfp503D_KgNnkwYPFQF3-Wc=)__

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xkXybUTYZwvHC5tlAGeFWE6RYunqK5fADUBdcLnmDt0= "https://act.myngp.com/el/mD0nXGoBsVOYvynZZT7Bb6hH-3tfZXS3qCjgX6FMCV4=/xkXybUTYZwvHC5tlAGeFWE6RYunqK5fADUBdcLnmDt0=").

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Hey Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS Stewart Navarre for Congress
body:
I joined this race because I know that our country is more divided than ever. And it’s times like these that require folks with experience in tough situations and experience bringing people together for a positive result. I did that as a Marine and I will do it as your Congressman. But I need your help to get there first. Right now, we’re just $1,404 away from our $5,000 goal, which we need to hit by the end of the day tomorrow. Can you chip in right now so that we can achieve our goal? | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33246573/298298757/1367184810?refcode=210730-email-am&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2JlNTQ4MS01N2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5150215mZWQBNXTqr-Vyw3bINKyl_8A-BKpGMXXTzI=) Peter, I am running because I am concerned that our country is too divided. And it is times like these that require folks with experience in tough situations and the ability to bring people together for a positive result. I subscribe to Teddy Roosevelt's belief that it is the individual in the arena who makes the difference. There isn’t any other team I would rather be standing with in the arena, so I am reaching out to ask for a favor. **[Right now, we’re still short of our $5,000 goal, which we need to hit by the end of the day tomorrow. Can you chip in right now so that we can achieve our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33246574/298298758/1367184810?refcode=210730-email-am&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2JlNTQ4MS01N2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5150215mZWQBNXTqr-Vyw3bINKyl_8A-BKpGMXXTzI=)** Our path to victory is dependent on building a strong, grassroots movement of supporters who are serious about continuing the healing process for our nation. That’s why I am asking if you can chip in today -- anything you can give is greatly appreciated and can be contributed through this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33246575/298298759/1367184810?refcode=210730-email-am&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2JlNTQ4MS01N2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5150215mZWQBNXTqr-Vyw3bINKyl_8A-BKpGMXXTzI=)** Thank you so much,
Stewart [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33246576/298298760/83927293?refcode=210730-email-am&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2JlNTQ4MS01N2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5150215mZWQBNXTqr-Vyw3bINKyl_8A-BKpGMXXTzI=) PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS Stewart Navarre for Congress

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=684b62148e6a4087a844706cc6dabc8e&_e=_WujJ2fzyX47fu40u4AhItIHOIhiRILFOxmjsetGT3GRADDVB9A4jizIc6sTbU38jbDwueErpwAFEIPLZT94l3Wf7dch6j2iiV3tEtJmG0s6Bch19jEES6OOWY3Z-0W54x_yJ84jpqj0NBJe-pgHpGhzpqVd4DIYQF4w-XnhjvUyC4X9ADEuVnplRde2mfrfBrFVIM2JPk8UERw3IMTECNHhHCyWqIY6nP-7h2yfB8J4gtTYPcFAH4C2QMXiU8kpBnnsKaBRNkLwpxHrgJmxfUdk6SSnkzQjwJlBwXHslmGaXuI5PyHog1kUZe0WJEKAF7QzeODBpMVv4xKvEMR0Uu1trbVjDHdwQueHMcUq8Fq9gPb7DerS53JHI8qAZgaMrlUqz-zxG5mlXFq98G8HIBkHvs3hHnKUR5uUQWu5XffIFYJ51TvRR_-lCacoJloqoC43eYKE4qqfMhv4vWSiNw%3D%3D)

I'll be blunt, Fellow American,

I hate to write emails like this but we’re not where we should be with our digital fundraising goal, and July is almost over.

Ever since I announced my intention to run for United States Senate, I’ve been the number one target of the Left.

They’ve called me every name in the book, but I can assure you, I will not back down.

**I’ll stand up for freedom because I know that folks like you want to be self-reliant and work hard**.

But Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and the radicals in Washington want to grow our government. They are pushing massive spending, indoctrinating our children in public schools, but are ignoring how their failed policies leading to skyrocketing inflation and a record number of illegal immigrant crossings.

The only way we can stop their radical plan is to take back the Senate next year, **[and I need your help.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=684b62148e6a4087a844706cc6dabc8e&_e=_WujJ2fzyX47fu40u4AhItIHOIhiRILFOxmjsetGT3GRADDVB9A4jizIc6sTbU38jbDwueErpwAFEIPLZT94l3Wf7dch6j2iiV3tEtJmG0s6Bch19jEES6OOWY3Z-0W54x_yJ84jpqj0NBJe-pgHpGhzpqVd4DIYQF4w-XnhjvUyC4X9ADEuVnplRde2mfrfBrFVIM2JPk8UERw3IMTECNHhHCyWqIY6nP-7h2yfB8J4gtTYPcFAH4C2QMXiU8kpwU9BifMv2Qa5smX8PO2hYAkzylNio8v70_2AqgFmYfNybtvlNjUp_CNSRDfcLjvRiJQ0sO4xeD2TXzSmUyVj_u77QNYZQxN2MfdrNnBhaVN6LrKhTAgNGGI_56ziPK9Pmk333wItWJ4--1rg_izpMTPb2e9GBV3Y79AGu5Q6o6YTFzhV2AL9C3fgZO_Y9YfqVWDngPTVYU3O3bcwfK82qQ%3D%3D)**

**[Our monthly deadline is just days away, and we’re short of our goal. Fellow American, if you’re ready for a change, I need YOU to stand with me before midnight on Saturday](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=684b62148e6a4087a844706cc6dabc8e&_e=_WujJ2fzyX47fu40u4AhItIHOIhiRILFOxmjsetGT3GRADDVB9A4jizIc6sTbU38jbDwueErpwAFEIPLZT94l3Wf7dch6j2iiV3tEtJmG0s6Bch19jEES6OOWY3Z-0W54x_yJ84jpqj0NBJe-pgHpGhzpqVd4DIYQF4w-XnhjvUyC4X9ADEuVnplRde2mfrfBrFVIM2JPk8UERw3IMTECNHhHCyWqIY6nP-7h2yfB8J4gtTYPcFAH4C2QMXiU8kp_etCw3ukGkWa07RDmkRwUJhoAPkxE7CuHQRlCnZgymYr84m_QgAGsx47Sb3M8alBuxByF9t2eI7hPnzUY3Klbc4UQv5Z_802P6YCicNGPmrqnukNlLZgeaXSZsMGp9JIHHAyoRj_AbqRlcGuhT2WaFeKLTfuURaKYjRnkwE5H7HBZ8Pd3jLWapYbiPveA9fWlnzDvDW8o9rhfYCvkc3tpg%3D%3D)**.

[** CHIP IN BEFORE JULY 31st **](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=684b62148e6a4087a844706cc6dabc8e&_e=_WujJ2fzyX47fu40u4AhItIHOIhiRILFOxmjsetGT3GRADDVB9A4jizIc6sTbU38jbDwueErpwAFEIPLZT94l3Wf7dch6j2iiV3tEtJmG0s6Bch19jEES6OOWY3Z-0W54x_yJ84jpqj0NBJe-pgHpGhzpqVd4DIYQF4w-XnhjvUyC4X9ADEuVnplRde2mfrfBrFVIM2JPk8UERw3IMTECNHhHCyWqIY6nP-7h2yfB8J4gtTYPcFAH4C2QMXiU8kpQrv5Rwpp6ZNHG3okIEwvx40peKXxgXcmSJYqvu7tyndzO1WoXedf1UjiYK640YnJPITq8lobTF5NKJZ_Cshn9cp9ioijvKaDmTGSTN0b9Io-Fj98lsppCV6nkwl-WmQG76wDTwu_Hl3uAZjzLlCrM-apBatd6_0cDv4_mzeCB34GJmQDf4E0fkN3bSERxDTHoBJcu1YgcHLCywRyRerjXw%3D%3D)

I am ready to head to Washington so that we are free to do what we feel is correct.

**[Please help however you can before July is over!](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=684b62148e6a4087a844706cc6dabc8e&_e=_WujJ2fzyX47fu40u4AhItIHOIhiRILFOxmjsetGT3GRADDVB9A4jizIc6sTbU38jbDwueErpwAFEIPLZT94l3Wf7dch6j2iiV3tEtJmG0s6Bch19jEES6OOWY3Z-0W54x_yJ84jpqj0NBJe-pgHpGhzpqVd4DIYQF4w-XnhjvUyC4X9ADEuVnplRde2mfrfBrFVIM2JPk8UERw3IMTECNHhHCyWqIY6nP-7h2yfB8J4gtTYPcFAH4C2QMXiU8kpl69Y5ZWR3fY1ClUKjHbcW9wO6YvFp-7n7nKb_t_i0J0rkSVhJmlsKYJVf_NSgnzgTzEfv6elySDu622C0dpXBWtl5yFEwTE5edEPhMF1qxk6pGo5qsy1TnaCT0ulKof8SEV57YZFbPemFj87MUCswnUASX0NZr7KeXMjmQt1HG3Z-zoSctZ34ah7xIfxc04almcok9MfGt2lcTv5wuW3kg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: : The Left would like nothing better than to see me fail, but I’ll continue to work hard for you One of the biggest lies ever told to the American people was when Joe Biden said he wanted to "Unify America". | I'll be blunt, Fellow American, I hate to write emails like this but we’re not where we should be with our digital fundraising goal, and July is almost over. Ever since I announced my intention to run for United States Senate, I’ve been the number one target of the Left. They’ve called me every name in the book, but I can assure you, I will not back down. I’ll stand up for freedom because I know that folks like you want to be self-reliant and work hard. But Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and the radicals in Washington want to grow our government. They are pushing massive spending, indoctrinating our children in public schools, but are ignoring how their failed policies leading to skyrocketing inflation and a record number of illegal immigrant crossings. The only way we can stop their radical plan is to take back the Senate next year, . I am ready to head to Washington so that we are free to do what we feel is correct. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?
