clean_body: Can you spare a moment? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, The job of electing Republicans and securing the Battleground State of North Carolina has never been more important. Experts from both parties agree that North Carolina is one of the Battleground States that’s most likely to flip in the 2022 Midterm Elections. We’re racing to keep pace and stay in the fight, but right now we’re dangerously close to missing our End-Of-Month Fundraising Deadline Goal. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | We only need 2,598 more donors to step up and chip in for us to reach our goal. That’s why we’re coming to you! We know you’re one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Florida. If we can’t count on you, who can we count on?! | Thank you. Chairman Michael Whatley Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **- ****July 30, 2021-** **\- American Jobs Plan Tour's Continued Success -** The Indiana Democratic Party continued traveling around the state to share with Hoosiers why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan. The Party is fulfilling its promise to meet Hoosiers everywhere, and we won't stop until people across Indiana know that Democratic policies - not Republican controversies - are delivering a better future for Hoosier families. Join us at an event near you! Contact your local county party to find out when the next event will be. **\- Bipartisan Biden Clears Key Hurdle in Passing Historic Infrastructure Deal -** President Joe Biden delivered on his promise of being a deal-making president this week by securing a key vote to pave the way for a historic -- **_and bipartisan!_** \- infrastructure deal. Joined by 17 Republican senators, the vote allows lawmakers to continue to hash out elements of the American Jobs Plan that will create a better future for Hoosier families, including roads, bridges, dams, airports, and rural broadband internet. The package is hugely popular -- despite U.S. Senator Mike Braun voting "NO". Biden's success proves that Hoosiers want a president who's unafraid to work with both sides of the aisle to get things done. There's too much at stake for leaders in Washington to play games and manufacture controversies each news cycle. Indiana needs to build back better from COVID-19 and this investment will create a strong future for Hoosier families to succeed. **\- Braun, INGOP Continue Partisan Campaign Against Democrats -- and Todd Young ****-** Indiana Democrats have traveled across Indiana to share how it is Democrats that are delivering for Hoosier families. But, Indiana Republicans like U.S. Senators Mike Braun have continued their partisan crusade against Democrats. Braun and the Indiana Republican Party just this week criticized Democrats for "spending too much money" in Washington, D.C. While they conveniently left out the $2.3 trillion tax cut they supported in 2017, the INGOP have now started to attack one of their own, Senator Tood Young, for supporting the bipartisan infrastructure deal that passed by procedural vote on Wednesday. If the Republicans continue to attack Democrats on so-called "spending", they'll be attacking their own U.S. Senator who's up for reelection in 2022. Republicans are resorting to their old "obstruction at all costs" playbook because President Biden and Indiana Democrats are delivering a better future for Hoosier families. From expanding broadband access and delivering good-paying jobs for our workers to putting shots in Hoosiers' arms, Democrats are hard at work delivering for Indiana. It's why the GOP resorts to misinformation and myths to attack - because it's all they've got. Indiana Democrats won't allow misinformation to keep getting in the way of improving the lives of Hoosiers all over the state - **we won't let them**. Democrats are ready to continue this work and prove that partnerships - not partisanship - between our state and federal governments will help to build a better future for Indiana and its families. **\- Opportunities -** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249343/298308695/-1140133020?FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=&emci=fb8e97de-aef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a34209a2-5cf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535)**[**Click here to sign up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249344/298308696/-1140133020?FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=&emci=fb8e97de-aef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a34209a2-5cf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249345/298308697/76531361?refcode=FFF.07.30.21.&FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=)**\- Fall Internship 2021 -** **** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
Qualifications Applications must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible.
* * *
How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Email Lauren or call 317-231-7122 for more information. **\- How are we doing? -** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249346/298308698/992448010?FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=&emci=fb8e97de-aef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a34209a2-5cf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) _**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's Market](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249347/298308699/-1664642187?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=&emci=fb8e97de-aef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a34209a2-5cf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), July 31, 9:00 - clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | - July 30, 2021- \- American Jobs Plan Tour's Continued Success - The Indiana Democratic Party continued traveling around the state to share with Hoosiers why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan. The Party is fulfilling its promise to meet Hoosiers everywhere, and we won't stop until people across Indiana know that Democratic policies - not Republican controversies - are delivering a better future for Hoosier families. Join us at an event near you! Contact your local county party to find out when the next event will be. \- Bipartisan Biden Clears Key Hurdle in Passing Historic Infrastructure Deal - President Joe Biden delivered on his promise of being a deal-making president this week by securing a key vote to pave the way for a historic -- and bipartisan! \- infrastructure deal. Joined by 17 Republican senators, the vote allows lawmakers to continue to hash out elements of the American Jobs Plan that will create a better future for Hoosier families, including roads, bridges, dams, airports, and rural broadband internet. The package is hugely popular -- despite U.S. Senator Mike Braun voting "NO". Biden's success proves that Hoosiers want a president who's unafraid to work with both sides of the aisle to get things done. There's too much at stake for leaders in Washington to play games and manufacture controversies each news cycle. Indiana needs to build back better from COVID-19 and this investment will create a strong future for Hoosier families to succeed. \- Braun, INGOP Continue Partisan Campaign Against Democrats -- and Todd Young - Indiana Democrats have traveled across Indiana to share how it is Democrats that are delivering for Hoosier families. But, Indiana Republicans like U.S. Senators Mike Braun have continued their partisan crusade against Democrats. Braun and the Indiana Republican Party just this week criticized Democrats for "spending too much money" in Washington, D.C. While they conveniently left out the $2.3 trillion tax cut they supported in 2017, the INGOP have now started to attack one of their own, Senator Tood Young, for supporting the bipartisan infrastructure deal that passed by procedural vote on Wednesday. If the Republicans continue to attack Democrats on so-called "spending", they'll be attacking their own U.S. Senator who's up for reelection in 2022. Republicans are resorting to their old "obstruction at all costs" playbook because President Biden and Indiana Democrats are delivering a better future for Hoosier families. From expanding broadband access and delivering good-paying jobs for our workers to putting shots in Hoosiers' arms, Democrats are hard at work delivering for Indiana. It's why the GOP resorts to misinformation and myths to attack - because it's all they've got. Indiana Democrats won't allow misinformation to keep getting in the way of improving the lives of Hoosiers all over the state - we won't let them. Democrats are ready to continue this work and prove that partnerships - not partisanship - between our state and federal governments will help to build a better future for Indiana and its families. \- Opportunities - =\- Fall Internship 2021 - ** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applications must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Email Lauren or call 317-231-7122 for more information. \- How are we doing? - -Save the date- Bartholomew County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.30.21=FFF.07.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQyMDlhMi01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQaurmXjUs5wFCCVL2UZsgn0QTZkt8GdU914q6mZDzQ=&emci=fb8e97de-aef0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a34209a2-5cf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, July 31, 9:00 - name: Sara Jacobs
subject: this program is already changing lives:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
The Child Tax Credit is so significant that it’s projected to cut childhood poverty in half.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249396/298308904/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210730-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGJkMzhjMy01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2f_LJG83fCPSix8L-yeWKZcy5LZJQqD5WzlRYbVFchk=)
---
| On July 15, the first round of Child Tax Credit payments started hitting bank accounts across the country — meaning an influx of up to $300 a month per kid for almost 90% of American families. I’m especially proud that more than 44,000 families (and more than 148,000 kids!) in the 53rd District are set to benefit.

Since we passed the American Rescue Plan in March, I’ve had the chance to travel around the district and talk directly with parents and kids about what the Child Tax Credit means to them and their families. For so many of them, these monthly payments will be life-changing — helping them pay bills, buy household necessities, and plan for the future.

The Child Tax Credit is so significant that it’s projected to cut childhood poverty in half. But right now, it’s set to expire in just one year — and a short-term approach to tackling child poverty isn’t enough. **That’s why I’m working every day to make these tax credits permanent — because it’s unacceptable to allow even a single kid to fall back into poverty.**

I won’t lie — it’s an uphill battle. If Republicans take back control of the House in 2022, the Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that benefit American families will end. Between an already slim majority and upcoming redistricting, Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022 — including our district. [_**Can you chip in today to support our campaign and help me keep up this work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249397/298308905/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210730-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGJkMzhjMy01Y2YxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2f_LJG83fCPSix8L-yeWKZcy5LZJQqD5WzlRYbVFchk=)

body:
I’m starting to get a little worried about the elections in Virginia this November. We’ve got the strongest Democratic ticket possible, but the election is in less than 100 days and we have a lot of work to do if we’re going to defeat our extreme Republican opponent.
Folks,
I’m starting to get a little worried about the elections in Virginia this November. We’ve got the strongest Democratic ticket possible, but the election is in less than 100 days and we have a lot of work to do if we’re going to defeat our extreme Republican opponent.
Virginia Democrats need to take this seriously because everything we’ve been fighting for and all of our progress is on the line if Republicans flip Virginia red. And you know Donald Trump is already doing everything in his power to rally his base for this election.
[**Before the end of July tomorrow, I need your help to raise another $4,819 so that we have the resources we need going into this critical election. Will you chip in as much as you can right now so we can keep Virginia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33249909/298310290/-298646228?refcode=E10440-20210730-EOM4-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmI5OWNiOS01ZGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RtpMYogiblTtB7WcEh25mv5JF6eK6lYJl49uPukcTck=)

clean_body: | A few facts for you, folks: Fact: Our demands to fix the damn grid are gaining momentum in the Texas legislature, with calls growing more each and every day. Fact: Last reporting period, nearly 92 percent of our campaign’s donations came from small-dollar donors contributing $100 or less. Fact: Every dollar goes directly to our work to organize our communities, reach more voters, and build a movement strong enough to take on Dan Patrick. Fact: Mike is getting ready to hit the road soon, and wants you to join him in our fight for a better Texas. Pitch in $5 or any amount you can spare to help put Mike on a path to victory: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Whether it’s building a robust economic recovery, investing in our public schools and hospitals, fixing the damn grid, or protecting voting rights, Mike is ready to fight for everyday Texans. Thanks for stepping up, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

## Happy Friday fellow Patriots
Below are two quick updates.
---
**Mark Pukita on the Bob Frantz Authority** Mark was on with Bob Frantz (1420 AM - Cleveland) on Friday, July 30. Pukita and Frantz discussed the 2020 election and voting integrity, medical freedom, mask mandates, and the erosion of personal liberty. The interview is available on YouTube (https://youtu.be/2kt0OWrC_8g) and Facebook (https://fb.watch/73RQVIxKEb/). Share and tell your friends.
---
[ ](https://hl.t.hubspotstarter.net/e2t/tc/VVtBBj4JfH_4W6Yf_Zv4jPbLqW8GDvjX4vF590N4sL4cG3lGmwV1-WJV7CgJH_W2hKzRK1gT8VgVKKDMK6VYh9mW1Hj5mr1rHHz9W988p_H4zpq4CW6rHqCv6K4CBWW9cVq_Y2cqb6lW2Lsdjx5H-slZW5_f_3x88RJCnVkVh7H8DBCBlW84fBcp7HxlLmW11Z1sq50JBNDW89Tqh71zrG3mMmX02Rb0qx4W1QzDnL3K30lJW7lwwBc8rkc5wW7FnxSd85RKrLW1bzTMB5Wjsp3W809Vtg8tzDt4W7P1H-s168bYwW6fsHgF1nhC9X36rm1)

**Make Fairs Great Again: August 6, 7, 8** Mark will be on another fair tour on August 6, 7, 8. If you can help please let Bob Nicholson (bob@mark4ohio.com) know. Tell your friends to stop out and see Mark. Mark will be visiting the following locations: Friday, August 6
* Pike County Fair from 10am – 12pm
* Gallia County Fair from 1pm – 3pm
* Athens County Fair from 4pm – 6pm

Saturday, August 7
* Columbiana County Fair from 10am – 12pm
* Medina County Fair from 2pm – 4pm
* Wood County Fair from 7pm – 9pm

Sunday, August 8
* Champaign County Fair from 11am to 1pm
* Dublin Ohio Irish Festival from 3pm to 5pm

A sharable Facebook post is here: https://www.facebook.com/Mark4Ohio/posts/127724222862020

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: State Fair Time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
In many ways, 2021 is flying by. Even with no elections this year in Indiana, your Republican Party has been working hard to grow our party.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470754?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**State Fair Time!**_ In many ways, 2021 is flying by. Even with no elections this year in Indiana, your Republican Party has been working hard to grow our party and lay the foundation for a successful 2022 election cycle. One of the key initiatives we’ve undertaken to expand our party was the launch of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. As many of you know, we celebrated the inaugural graduating class of our diversity series last week. The 300 plus Hoosiers that came to support our graduates represented the most diverse gathering of Indiana Republicans in recent memory. Unashamedly sharing our proud, conservative Republican story to communities that haven’t heard it yet is one way we grow our party and recruit more leaders. Thanks again to all who made the first class of the series so successful. It is already turning heads and making a difference.

And, as we’re turning the calendar page from July to August, the Indiana State Fair is getting underway today. Your Indiana Republican Party will have a presence out at the Fair every day and I encourage you to stop by and visit our booth. We’ll have information on some of our 2022 candidates, and some fun games to play. We’re grateful to all the volunteers who’ve signed up for shifts at the fair and I look forward to getting out there a few times over the next couple weeks for a corn dog. Or two. Or ten.
Thanks,

Kyle

**_Photo: _**_(L-R) RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel, Indiana GOP Director of Diversity and Engagement Whitley Yates, Governor Eric Holcomb, Senator Todd Young, and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer honor graduates of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Ground Breakings and Grand Openings_**
**Governor Holcomb** visited Westfield at the site where West for Whiskey broke ground for their new facility. The new building will house an entertainment center featuring retail, restaurants and more.

**Governor Holcomb** kicked off the grand opening of the 2021 Indiana State Fair this week in Indianapolis. The festivities got underway with the annual pork breakfast and opening ceremonies on Friday. The [Indiana State Fair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c32447509&e=1acd9bb3d6) runs through August 22.
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb speaking at the site of the new West for Whiskey facility. Gov. Holcomb cutting the ribbon to officially kick off the 2021 Indiana State Fair._
---
|
---
| _**Holcomb-Crouch Inaugural Events**_
You are invited to join us for our Holcomb-Crouch inaugural events! Purchase tickets at [www.imagineindiana.org](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eadd8ba192&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Lugar Series Applications**_ Applications for the 32nd Class of the Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series are now available! The Lugar Series is a political leadership development program dedicated to increasing the number of Republican women in local, state and federal elective and appointive office. The application period opened on June 1 and closes on August 1, 2021. Information about the application can be found at [lugarseries.com/apply/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b7f5882a12&e=1acd9bb3d6) or by contacting [lugarseries@gmail.com](mailto:lugarseries@gmail.com).
---
|
---
| _**Senator Todd Young's Op-Ed**_ The Biden administration is directly responsible for the rising costs we are seeing every day. Read Senator Todd Young's Op-Ed here: [https://www.nwitimes.com/opinion/sen-todd-young-biden-harris-agenda-has-raised-cost-of-living-hurt-middle-class/article_9f045c84-1c2a-5bbf-93a8-8f5932041834.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=642f76d83e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer on WOWO**_ Listen to Chairman Hupfer's full interview about the Holcomb-Crouch team's upcoming inaugural events: [https://www.wowo.com/an-inauguration-celebration-like-no-other-7-months-delayed/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c2e8260e06&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3041e23b75&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e2a9ac7f7&e=1acd9bb3d6): Parke County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db3ce75296&e=1acd9bb3d6): Dekalb County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 14](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9cc0bee03d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Lincoln Lawn Party
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[cheers on the Zionsville little league team](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d39eeb7e55&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[visits Harvest Community Garden](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fc8127ed56&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [celebrates World Conservation Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=192f2acb0d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces refundable tax credits for Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fec4667dd2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[visits Lake County to meet the election team](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6fcda3139&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [wishes Hoosier Olympians good luck](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0cbe18d07&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[provides statement on the infrastructure bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=680155f78a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[criticizes the CDC's mask guidelines](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=89b83d67ba&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[vows to oppose federal mask mandates](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4c7a78289&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[hosts Senator Ted Cruz at the Republican Study Committee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6c78ae93c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [shares how farmers are affected by inflation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7acf1949ff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [helps Hoosiers get their passports](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3d9a56f5b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [shows support for the people of Cuba](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=66ddfe9a37&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[congratulates Hoosier Jackie Young on her gold medal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b46d60466&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[tours IBC Advanced Alloys' new expansion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb05c8c74e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.

**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**

_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._

**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---

There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58043401:J-o-WXl-N:m:1:3253819041:61DF400CCA2B160081C8FD5091F873E4:r)

subject: Calling a spade a spade

My opponent is a downright liar. I’m not easily offended; I have thick skin. But I’m also willing to call a spade a spade | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fefdf322ca3242b593b2fab788a15bc3&_e=6A5EYfATptPTex55JLGmdjePkyJ-dm_zKSw_uIAOga4oL6XBSyiaySkQBaI_7tha4mYDrpSc6dixuPBSNe7yLe0d1M0NrqjZCfGI14yp1pDE3PUnvThc0KVXpbM32spg852YkbnB73ywFCMZgqLcyjlcO6W7aLFMI7KTbuGhSNM8jl3ux6TDHxZ3uvVEQ-du0g0uVg33Bo6UsgxfS2on2eSveW6-afr5tf_9MxsAKIzAKAjMGuHRBVCgze107ZhR36jlj2QfzoTBiETip-ZH7iHgmpdDmpP5UMOxt5guC_rCaAkklAJnKuBnn0lwxU6Ou9qKQ4tUE2rZ_veac9ZZsyNRuDyrBesc5dA6rWwdS4XxPX3iHGfOhUMHPe83ODSwnCNF2-E7QZBUEzGcUdz9szhns-T39-DDNiUFsYD_xqYFVT7r1Twqh0JAxdiaXj0Y)

Peter,

I’m not easily offended; I have thick skin. But I’m also willing to call a spade a spade. **My opponent is a downright liar.**

He claims to be a _“man of the people”_ a _“trusted voice for Oregon,”_ yet he’s willing to tear apart people he doesn’t agree with, or in my case, someone willing to call him out for being a wolf in sheep’s clothing.

I’ll admit, I’m a little miffed that my opponent approved an email which his campaign sent out recently claiming that I’m _“off the rails.”_ Politics is a dirty game, and it turns out my Dem opponent has been brushing up on his mudslinging skills.

**I’m not off the rails, in fact my situation is quite the opposite. I’m running for Congress to stop this man from bankrupting our country.**

**[If you agree with me that government is too damn big, I’m asking you to chip in $3.5 right now to help me hit my July fundraising goal and take-out Peter DeFazio once and for all.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fefdf322ca3242b593b2fab788a15bc3&_e=6A5EYfATptPTex55JLGmdjePkyJ-dm_zKSw_uIAOga4oL6XBSyiaySkQBaI_7tha4mYDrpSc6dixuPBSNe7yLe0d1M0NrqjZCfGI14yp1pDE3PUnvThc0KVXpbM32spg852YkbnB73ywFCMZgqLcyjlcO6W7aLFMI7KTbuGhSNM8jl3ux6TDHxZ3uvVEQ-du0g0uVg33Bo6UsgxfS2on2eSveW6-afr5tf_9MxsAKIzxTUmPZ0zu8MI6U8L3jonjjMNnr4JhE-tdbz7_wR3r83iphw2CiWjpBwLleoLl5DmppthzMssYETLEqUxfsr0yLDb3KAlNG-MKl_yexfX-tr5pRSOD_uWfOs2Y5cP9hEwkqhhPin0e4KckoYuQIgUi7RTz5pY6hE13WM6FfQLxVGZ_dSR4vIC0h0mysrE9AiZvyn699SCEODqpaWnetj2b)**

I’m quite surprised he even has time to think about me. I mean, it takes a lot of time to plan and execute the biggest spending spree/tax hike in U.S. history - but I’ll give it to him, he does have help in the form of Bernie Sanders -his best friend in Congress and the man who groomed him to be the socialist he is today.

Peter DeFazio is no longer a threat to just the people in Oregon’s 4th District, he’s a threat to every American across the nation. You think everyday expenses are pricy now, just wait until his $3.5 trillion tax hike passes.

**[There are only two days left until the end of the month and in order to reach my fundraising goal, I need you to chip in just $3.50 right now. | | When Tom first ran for the State Assembly in 2004, no one gave him a chance. It was a Republican seat, but Tom prevailed by knocking on thousands of doors and outworking his opponents. _And now we’re going to do the same thing again._

**Our campaign is centered around the people of Wisconsin, as it should be — and that is why we launched the Full Nelson Tour to visit all of Wisconsin’s 72 counties.**

On this tour, we will make it known in every corner of the state that Tom is the best candidate in this race — the one ready to fight for _all_ Wisconsinites. It’s well past time that Wall Street executives who seek to manipulate our government for profit, corporations that ship our jobs overseas, and billionaires who don’t pay their taxes get knocked out of the ring.

[_But we can’t do this without you._ We still have over $6k left to raise before Saturday’s deadline — chip in now to help us meet our goal and fund our tour:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33250945/298313898/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210730_1_4&refcode2=80601a1c-60f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDYwMWExYy02MGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kM65TuWWROd_WMPhkF6yn2UvP6pEXKKN8Gc9CrRE-2Y=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Donna Imam
subject: Unacceptable.
body:
This is about putting forward real, meaningful legislation. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33251894/298317231/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTFhMDBkMS02MWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5_6ScqluDT-cpl9XSsPhqmpCVsVl43SKTXcKz1lBKA=) Friend,

I'm running for Congress because too many people in my Texas community are struggling to make ends meet. They get up every morning, do good for this country and our communities, yet still have difficulty paying the rent or seeing a doctor because they're underinsured or have no health insurance. Not to mention the Texas GOP refuses to expand Medicaid leaving millions without coverage.

**This is unacceptable.**

It's no longer enough that Democrats control the House. This is about putting forward real, meaningful legislation. Supporting policies and co-sponsoring bills isn't enough. In Congress, I will actively work to build consensus around policies that will lower the cost for all of us and improve our lives: » Single-payer healthcare
» Thriving wages and more high-paying jobs
» A unified, national response to homelessness crisis
» Debt-free education
» Defending voting rights **[If you're serious about real change, join me and pitch in $3 to our campaign to turn this Texas congressional seat blue. clean_body: This is about putting forward real, meaningful legislation. | = Friend, I'm running for Congress because too many people in my Texas community are struggling to make ends meet. They get up every morning, do good for this country and our communities, yet still have difficulty paying the rent or seeing a doctor because they're underinsured or have no health insurance. Not to mention the Texas GOP refuses to expand Medicaid leaving millions without coverage. This is unacceptable. It's no longer enough that Democrats control the House. This is about putting forward real, meaningful legislation. Supporting policies and co-sponsoring bills isn't enough. In Congress, I will actively work to build consensus around policies that will lower the cost for all of us and improve our lives: » Single-payer healthcare » Thriving wages and more high-paying jobs » A unified, national response to homelessness crisis » Debt-free education » Defending voting rights = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I don't know about you, friend, but I'm getting a little tired of seeing all of the inequality and injustice in the country. PeterーAndrew here.

I heard my team reached out about Biden’s anti-small business agenda.

For over a year, small businesses were forced to shutter their businesses, navigate ever-changing restrictions, and face fines from out-of-control Democrat governors.

After surviving all of that, Biden is putting the final nail in the coffin by extending unemployment endlessly for young, healthy, and able-bodied Americans.

**Joe Biden is knowingly killing small businesses, and he doesn’t care.**

Why should he care? He’s a lifelong politician and represents everything that is wrong with Washington.

That’s why if we’re going to save our small businesses, we need to start fighting back. _**This is our last stand to save American small businesses!**_

While I’m busy fighting Biden’s attack against small businessesー _[**will you rush any amount now to help me reach my goal so I can continue my fight?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=9ea651ac50cc46f8aca21c3009eca6ad&_e=6SLrg88gqhI8t6IbFn5rnYkIRIGCS70NjI1awkH5bV9xzEQ8vXcINkEFDR7GfWodKtiG1N5D42okxz413EhndnHkam8k_Tn8OSEQ5z8z8Vkf0NrzQSlU9r1QPYL5FHUKFNrIOZkQFGVSCQ8-w4xnYY2iHwAg41hovUS5SfQWpBMoJK0whfN9RlsIkzhILeFYhOQvj5RMa38n_DnIo0RarcPZdMkhHfCuIdy6u_iC2LUIIEn01gXOKqDjm0k4ytpO5yBWJRy7DJO3riMvz66tPNVu0fNh8v8Pr34dhgV1Pp0bMQkZ0iVXJDkm_Po6o9OzD9zNdym1FRqsUoJaEtBToK87ZrR-2YlaUXaRu5LQbrP_BJ8vmXCP6eAeha5GVPYfVuDnxrRhFzUnf8ZdIUea_ft4o2HBnMUOUgSkvs3ozgyd_LKomNVDu0dWDjVlDYKvfOyemIE_4kYztLTUT3Af9O3lv5WzmITXUNNa5Imiza31RO9eEGpefH4oBM3l8qB1)_

After a year of small business-crushing restrictions and lockdowns, Biden has the nerve to take the credit for keeping small businesses open.

**If we followed the Biden lockdown plan,**_**there wouldn’t be a single small business left standing.**_

Now small businesses can’t hire anyone because of Biden-backed handouts, and his response was essentially: **_‘too bad, pay them more’_**.

This is the response of someone who has never worked a day in his life and doesn’t know the risks and struggles of owning your own business.

Not Andrew, though.

He comes from a family of small business owners and has worked for small businesses most of his life. He understands how hard it is to keep the lights on and the doors open, especially now.

That’s why we’re reaching out. His _**END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE**_ is coming up on **July 31st** , and we’re hoping to get your support.

clean_body: Biden is putting the final nail in the coffin by extending... | | | PeterーAndrew here. I heard my team reached out about Biden’s anti-small business agenda. For over a year, small businesses were forced to shutter their businesses, navigate ever-changing restrictions, and face fines from out-of-control Democrat governors. After surviving all of that, Biden is putting the final nail in the coffin by extending unemployment endlessly for young, healthy, and able-bodied Americans. Joe Biden is knowingly killing small businesses, and he doesn’t care. Why should he care? He’s a lifelong politician and represents everything that is wrong with Washington. That’s why if we’re going to save our small businesses, we need to start fighting back. This is our last stand to save American small businesses! While I’m busy fighting Biden’s attack against small businessesー Thank you, Andrew Garbarino \---------- forwarded message below ---------- From: Republican Alerts (Team Garbarino) Date: Tues. July 27th, 2021 at 10:16 AM Subject: Biden has never worked a day in his life...it shows To: | Peter, you probably didn’t catch this exchange with Biden and an Ohio small business owner; most people missed it because no one was watching Biden’s Town Hall ー After a year of small business-crushing restrictions and lockdowns, Biden has the nerve to take the credit for keeping small businesses open. If we followed the Biden lockdown plan,there wouldn’t be a single small business left standing. Now small businesses can’t hire anyone because of Biden-backed handouts, and his response was essentially: ‘too bad, pay them more’. This is the response of someone who has never worked a day in his life and doesn’t know the risks and struggles of owning your own business. Not Andrew, though. He comes from a family of small business owners and has worked for small businesses most of his life. He understands how hard it is to keep the lights on and the doors open, especially now. That’s why we’re reaching out. His END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE is coming up on July 31st , and we’re hoping to get your support. Dear friends, These last few weeks have been incredibly humbling. We are seeing a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth as the momentum continues to build. Each week, more and more Virginians come together to help us bring much needed positive change to our Commonwealth. And that starts with investing in all Virginians.

Yesterday, I announced my vision to invest in Virginians by utilizing the state surplus and American Rescue Plan Act. It’s simple – it’s about putting more money into Virginians’ pockets, not government bureaucracy. It will provide needed relief to taxpayers and families, reinvigorate Virginia’s job machine, reestablish excellence and empower parents in education, and rescue public safety.

clean_body: These last few weeks have been incredibly humbling. We are seeing a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth as the momentum continues | | | | ---|---|--- Dear friends, These last few weeks have been incredibly humbling. We are seeing a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth as the momentum continues to build. Each week, more and more Virginians come together to help us bring much needed positive change to our Commonwealth. And that starts with investing in all Virginians. Yesterday, I announced my vision to invest in Virginians by utilizing the state surplus and American Rescue Plan Act. It’s simple – it’s about putting more money into Virginians’ pockets, not government bureaucracy. It will provide needed relief to taxpayers and families, reinvigorate Virginia’s job machine, reestablish excellence and empower parents in education, and rescue public safety. ## | | | ---|---|--- Suzanne, Grant, and I had the wonderful opportunity to visit the Washington Football Team’s training camp in Richmond. We had a great time meeting with Virginians who are excited about the upcoming season! | | | ---|---|--- Now when you’re winning, your opponents start slinging the mud. It’s easier for Terry McAuliffe to launch false attacks on me instead of answering questions about his abysmal record and questionable alliances. Just this week he was endorsed by extremist organization, New Virginia Majority, which advocates for , wants to and . But we won’t be discouraged. We’re having fun. Terry and his allies can try to smear me all they want. We know Virginians will see through politics as usual. From meeting with small business leaders, to engaging with voters of all faiths, backgrounds, and creeds, we’re connecting with Virginians who are ready for a governor who will go to work for them and bring effective leadership to Richmond. | | | ---|---|--- The excitement we are seeing across the Commonwealth continues to build and I will remain relentless in my efforts to make Virginia the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family. Now, come on Virginia, let’s go win this thing! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Will you help me celebrate my fiancé Malcolm's birthday today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hi friends, it’s Malcolm’s fiancé, Dr. Matt.
I’m reaching out today to ask you to donate to our campaign in honor of Malcolm's birthday (and because we've got a big deadline tomorrow).
I fell in love with Malcolm because he's someone who shows his love for his community through acts of service.
Whether he's leading block clean-ups in Philly or traveling across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, he's always doing something to help others meet their needs and accomplish their dreams.
And he'll take that same energy to the United States Senate, where I know he'll be a champion for all working families like ours.
But the success of our movement depends on our ability to bring a huge coalition of folks together, and we've got to hit every fundraising goal to stay competitive in this race.
**We need a lot more folks to step up before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, so I was hoping you could pitch in. Whether it's $31 in honor of Malcolm's 31st birthday, or a couple of bucks, it all adds up in a big way to fuel our campaign.**
[Will you make a contribution today to support our campaign? I know it would mean a lot to Malcolm for you to donate on his birthday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33253529/298322170/-353695395?refcode2=2de73bbc-66f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210730-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU3M2JiYy02NmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYIiFuJogfc70LyaNe6CaH85Mo-YDfSvyqqhM1UKmvY=)
Thanks for being a part of our movement.
Onwards and upwards,
Dr. Matt

name: Team Padilla
subject: 2 Problems
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share.
There is just **1 day** to go until our big July fundraising deadline and we still have some work to do to reach our 2,000 contribution goal.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this but we are facing two big problems. First, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California and they are setting their sights on our campaign as well. And second, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made it clear they will govern from the minority by using the filibuster to prevent us from passing legislation.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. We need to hold this Senate seat in California and expand our majority so it becomes impossible for McConnell and his allies to block us from the minority.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our grassroots campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Alex in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210730-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=199_159979_GSdbPr&akid=199%2E159979%2EGSdbPr)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=199_159979_GSdbPr&akid=199%2E159979%2EGSdbPr) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=199_159979_GSdbPr&akid=199%2E159979%2EGSdbPr)
---|---

---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=199_159979_GSdbPr&akid=199%2E159979%2EGSdbPr) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=7&refcode2=199_159979_GSdbPr&akid=199%2E159979%2EGSdbPr)

We can hold this seat and keep Alex in the Senate if lots of people chip in what they can, when they can.
Your support will help us fight back against whatever Republicans throw at us and continue to run a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives.
Thank you for having Alex’s back.
Team Padilla

Friend,

body:
#

Friends — we have some good news and some bad news.
**The bad news is** we are still a little short on the progress to our 10,000 contribution goal. 2,238 donations, to be exact, and we really can’t afford to fall short this month.
**The good news is** there’s still time to make up for lost ground! We know that this team can show up and chip in $5 or $10 at a time, and still go up against the NRA and NSFF and win.
Because of your donations, we’ve made a lot of progress on gun safety so far this year. The House Appropriations Committee just approved $50M to double the federal investment in gun violence research at the CDC & NIH. And they also just approved a historic $200 million in new funding for community violence intervention programs across the country.
However, we still need this funding to be voted on and passed by Congress. And at the same time, we’re still working to get universal background checks signed into law. We have a lot of work still to do, so we need to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210730-1-15&t=1&refcode2=424_3935704_ayuNva&akid=424%2E3935704%2EayuNva)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Did you hear what Trump said about Mark Kelly??
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Tomorrow is our July fundraising deadline, and at midnight we are going to report our fundraising numbers, so we need a surge of support today to help us stay on track to hit our 40,000 contribution goal.
It’s crucial we hit this goal because just this month a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And only a few days ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So we need to keep up the pace in order to fight back against Trump’s latest attack and our newest opponent, but we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped so far today.
So we need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our July fundraising deadline? We only have a few hours left to hit this goal and anything you can afford to give will go a long way towards helping Mark hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1053_6688874__QIw-e&akid=1053%2E6688874%2E_QIw-e)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1053_6688874__QIw-e&akid=1053%2E6688874%2E_QIw-e)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for whatever Trump and Mitch McConnell throw at us next.
So seriously, thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210730-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1053_6688874__QIw-e&akid=1053%2E6688874%2E_QIw-e)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1053%2E6688874%2E_QIw-e).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: RE: I need your help

Did you see my note, folks? I hate asking you for money, but now that **Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are involved in my race,** I really need your support to ramp up my campaign. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat, and they're laser-focused on mine. Mitch McConnell is already spending millions against me, and there's more to come. **If I lose, Democrats will lose control of the Senate, halting progress on issues like Roe v. Wade, climate change, and voting rights.** Right now, we're still behind our July fundraising goal, with less than 48 hours left. **[Can you chip in just $5 today to help get us over the finish line? What we raise will help fund critical work to defend this seat like on-the-ground organizers, TV and digital ads, and get out the vote efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255025/298327628/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)** From the bottom of my heart, thank you. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Thur., July 29, 2021
Subject: I need your help Hi there, I need your help now that Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have decided that defeating me in New Hampshire is the fastest way to put Republicans back in charge of the Senate. They're even personally recruiting my 2022 opponent. Mitch McConnell's cronies are attacking me on TV. One McConnell-linked group has targeted me as part of a multi-million dollar ad campaign. And it’s working - **a WMUR poll that recently came out has me DOWN by ONE POINT.** My team says we need to raise an average of $2,500 each day between now and the end of the month to hit our July goal. **[Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can to help us hit that benchmark today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255028/298327629/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)** McConnell and his buddies have promised that more ads are coming. It’s no surprise _The Boston Globe_ called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection.” _This is no time for my grassroots support to dip._ If we stumble now, we’ll hand the Republicans a huge talking point. More outside money will pour into New Hampshire. Our opponents will step up their attacks. **Republicans only need to flip one seat to regain Senate control, and right now, polls show that they could flip my seat in New Hampshire.** If they defeat me and take back the Senate, there will be no progress on issues like jobs, voting rights, climate change, and protecting a woman’s right to choose. **[With all this at stake, will you please let me know that I have your support by donating $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255029/298327630/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255030/298327633/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255033/298327636/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)
As you know, CNN says this is one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in the next election. I won my last race by just 1,017 votes. I’m behind in the polls.
The only way that we can protect this seat – and our Senate majority – is by showing strong, early grassroots support. **[That’s why I need you to please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255034/298327637/-846459524?refcode=e20210730_mwh-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIyY2IwYS02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXwn50UR0SjrTna3Gnz_rnxUDS41O-xyUE7z89WdHG4=)**
Thank you so much for everything that you do for our campaign. You’re one of my most valued supporters. I’ll be grateful for your continued support today.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Bob Carlstrom, AMAC Action
subject: From the Oval Office
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c243%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EYvO32y9tiAwDH6baJaddQ&sysid=1)
Friend, Last September 28, I met with President Trump in the Oval Office on behalf of our 2.4 million AMAC members. There were two things on my heart that day, two things I said to him... _1\. Thank you for all that you have done for America and conservative seniors._ 2\. We have your back and you can count on us. I pledged that we in AMAC Action will continue fighting for conservative solutions. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65698%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gfjxwXXvcw7%2f9%2fPUr7lnxA&sysid=1) Today, I am writing to you to ask that you join with AMAC Action as we continue fighting for American values. Will you join me and our army of 2.4 million conservative patriots to save our country from being destroyed by today’s far-Left Democrats? [**Please consider giving a donation of $25 dollars to AMAC Action to join us in fighting for our country’s future.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65699%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RCNklGhwD4Yr%2bw%2bnNudGGQ&sysid=1) Do you remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Do you remember when there was peace in the Middle East and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? And do you remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, terrorist bombs fly into Israel on a daily basis, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it’s been since the Obama era. _Don’t be fooled ... these things did not happen by accident._ They’re a direct result of the far-Left Democrat’s intentional plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I’m afraid that if folks like you and me do not immediately challenge them and sustain that challenge, America is going to be weakened. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us restore our American greatness by making a contribution of just $25 to AMAC Action today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65690%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VUqYTbtlR%2bEZ68mjcZFhlw&sysid=1) Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. Unlike the Left-leaning AARP, AMAC Action is the largest and most impactful conservative senior advocacy group in the country. _In fact, you may have heard of us before ..._ _We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with “Obamacare” and “Medicare for All” ..._ _ _ _We stood up to the Congressional Democrat’s repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation ..._ _ _ _And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we’re standing up to the Biden-Harris-Pelosi led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution._ Right now, our 59 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.4 million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we’re in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. [**Will you help us fight for our America-first values in Congress with a one-time gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to AMAC Action today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65691%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZRex71HXJYQHPll4lyed2w&sysid=1) If God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Bob Carlstrom President, AMAC Action [**SUPPORT AMAC ACTION**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65692%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WBgIVjZiwIWoyJVsk5uUoQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65698%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gfjxwXXvcw7%2f9%2fPUr7lnxA&sysid=1) AMAC stands here to fight for our God-given rights and to protect our American values! We stand guard for our Constitution and the freedom it guarantees. | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65693%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6jhnTxp41CrZjDe7lIPcyA&sysid=1)

clean_body: Friend, Last September 28, I met with President Trump in the Oval Office on behalf of our 2.4 million AMAC members. There were two things on my heart that day, two things I said to him... 1\. Thank you for all that you have done for America and conservative seniors. 2\. We have your back and you can count on us. I pledged that we in AMAC Action will continue fighting for conservative solutions. Today, I am writing to you to ask that you join with AMAC Action as we continue fighting for American values. Will you join me and our army of 2.4 million conservative patriots to save our country from being destroyed by today’s far-Left Democrats? Do you remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Do you remember when there was peace in the Middle East and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? And do you remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, terrorist bombs fly into Israel on a daily basis, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it’s been since the Obama era. Don’t be fooled ... these things did not happen by accident. They’re a direct result of the far-Left Democrat’s intentional plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I’m afraid that if folks like you and me do not immediately challenge them and sustain that challenge, America is going to be weakened. Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. Unlike the Left-leaning AARP, AMAC Action is the largest and most impactful conservative senior advocacy group in the country. In fact, you may have heard of us before ... We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with “Obamacare” and “Medicare for All” ... We stood up to the Congressional Democrat’s repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation ... And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we’re standing up to the Biden-Harris-Pelosi led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution. Right now, our 59 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.4 million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we’re in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. If God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. Thank you in advance for your generous support. Sincerely, Bob Carlstrom President, AMAC Action AMAC stands here to fight for our God-given rights and to protect our American values! name: Christy Smith
subject: This time, we’re going to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255160/298328176/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmQxZDE3My02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sx3JKUaICPm9J3G3CtiHkHfWFIIKglfFd0fFgT4XDHw=&emci=10513cc8-68f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3bd1d173-6af1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

$22.03

That's the average grassroots contribution to our campaign.

That's $5 here from a retired schoolteacher and $40 there from a union electrician.

It's folks like you giving a little bit when they can.

It's the kind of donation that makes this team so strong.

It's the donation I'll need to keep our momentum going. **Peter, we're just hours away from our deadline to raise $25,000 in grassroots contribution, and we're still $4,296 short. Here's the link to chip in.** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107_email_christy?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255161/298328177/453008394?refcode=em21_210730_eom3-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmQxZDE3My02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sx3JKUaICPm9J3G3CtiHkHfWFIIKglfFd0fFgT4XDHw=)**

Unlike Mike Garcia, we don't take money from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists -- big-money special interests who can write a check and donate thousands of dollars at the drop of a hat and expect something back in return. Now, that rule of ours can make fundraising harder, but it's the right way to win this race.

Our grassroots donors are truly the power behind this movement, and I'm so grateful to have so many of you with me in the fight to elect a real leader for CA-25. **I want you to know that when I'm elected, I'll be loyal to you --_not_ special interests.**

**Last year we only came up 333 votes short** , but since then, I have been on the ground and talking to the people and hearing your needs, and I have no doubt that this time around, we're going to win. We just need to give this campaign everything we've got.

I want the folks of our district to know that my vote isn't for sale -- and that I don't believe that anyone should be able to buy their way into Congress thanks to corporate PAC money.

**I'm proud that this is the way we're running our campaign, and I know we can win and take back this seat.**

So before I let you go, can I count you in for a donation to help power my grassroots campaign? Here's the link to chip in $5 or maybe even $22.03! **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107_email_christy?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33255162/298328178/453008394?refcode=em21_210730_eom3-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmQxZDE3My02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sx3JKUaICPm9J3G3CtiHkHfWFIIKglfFd0fFgT4XDHw=)**

Thanks so much,

Christy Smith

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/10513cc8-68f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/3bd1d173-6af1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmQxZDE3My02YWYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sx3JKUaICPm9J3G3CtiHkHfWFIIKglfFd0fFgT4XDHw=&id=113000550). Magic Mountain Pkwy

body:
Democrats are pounding the pavement and flooding the airwaves all across the state... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=542778be8e954a2db470514044dc9168&_e=-4JhNWlZkonYUlcnOrcAZICZ9ZII6D50PxW3eOtTvG50NJTs1jBTymrE1h-Jo5GHsbWxUoZXTLg2UNHB47Wc6yG1PB7H0PJajalOTkPuoO4zdwi95mjD_Vw0I0ZbXb21tFTy8bi7n-qJ4Q-AJRI3Z22RC7ufDnlRqbhaCu_p_QnI0JBEmnDnT-00Z68SYx-iqQ2cFL7UL0zU07OCmu4XnVQ6cHiakd0u1zvpfkBnfp6L29PDURIMSoUAMG5P4s7tD8GIk9u_NC3pijhdYXZeYrgmshflP5-obpTg6pVZ3wJqiyBCi4RUIImwvaNH-wQmMUWj-pMNnyDIZ7Q_pWCt3i1dj6_pRkikFSeq57Zhx1HPZaiAIf0lm-cXVPJF-GwLWKmarDnJUyfvvNvOhSihMxU6ATlApz1G9TIoEOFuWi3uTlIysDetjXUTXHxDqxovznRfoVGq0lvUo0iLauvLwA%3D%3D) Friend,

Democrats and Republicans don’t see eye-to-eye on a lot right now –– but here’s something we all agree on:

**The path to victory in 2022 goes right through Wisconsin.**

Democrats are pounding the pavement and flooding the airwaves all across the state in an effort to protect their razor-thin majority. They’ve come out of the gates swinging, and they’re prepared to spend millions of dollars down the stretch to win votes here.

Here’s the bottom line:

**Democrats might have the majority in Congress right now –– but there’s one thing they don’t have: Solutions to the problems facing our nation.** | |
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=542778be8e954a2db470514044dc9168&_e=-4JhNWlZkonYUlcnOrcAZICZ9ZII6D50PxW3eOtTvG50NJTs1jBTymrE1h-Jo5GHsbWxUoZXTLg2UNHB47Wc6yG1PB7H0PJajalOTkPuoO4zdwi95mjD_Vw0I0ZbXb21tFTy8bi7n-qJ4Q-AJRI3Z22RC7ufDnlRqbhaCu_p_QnI0JBEmnDnT-00Z68SYx-iqQ2cFL7UL0zU07OCmu4XnVQ6cHiakd0u1zvpfkBnfp6L29PDURIMSoUAMG5P4s7tae8KZ5vgx4LFS65ALLdpDtuutzeRvaol1ax-CKhMlgppnNIpbosTm19IBfdv8djvtLq4THyK7PmVqrAkjSYGwW7nonKIt_1JZtTW1gRMGtCp_18mHODtpMva7h5MVHpd2yu-IBsGJJyihrmhsrayZzmZXcy7oF1dTyO150tKHj6AbKpIW62v8pXrKJ9csq5V4PXbHLajRnuLycZGtdvYJw%3D%3D)
|
---
They can deny it all they want, but the Democrats’ failed policies have caused dramatic spikes in inflation, crime, and illegal border crossings.

It’s on us to take back Congress, implement common sense, conservative solutions, and get our country back on track.

**[Can I count on you to join the fight for Wisconsin by pitching in here?](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=542778be8e954a2db470514044dc9168&_e=-4JhNWlZkonYUlcnOrcAZICZ9ZII6D50PxW3eOtTvG50NJTs1jBTymrE1h-Jo5GHsbWxUoZXTLg2UNHB47Wc6yG1PB7H0PJajalOTkPuoO4zdwi95mjD_Vw0I0ZbXb21tFTy8bi7n-qJ4Q-AJRI3Z22RC7ufDnlRqbhaCu_p_QnI0JBEmnDnT-00Z68SYx-iqQ2cFL7UL0zU07OCmu4XnVQ6cHiakd0u1zvpfkBnfp6L29PDURIMSoUAMG5P4s7tUgzv1R3nJPC_Hi-MYdxWs-7LutzbZePLrO5luEvT_5RWyZilsh6fNn4koaUEV3OruGWQx9RNo_x_DkrE1FTbjDX-YU2QEU9Eej4NpIRSzxtbWBtCt1Roa2XXu0j58chYH2Vgntvs1rmI6o_YwGH3Or9zUF9Z1lPGJPLFRLDnbWUdiEXB-y8X5b2yGmS11WmT1OKn59_WaY20R68t7uzSbA%3D%3D)**
[**JOIN ME: FIGHT FOR WISCONSIN**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=542778be8e954a2db470514044dc9168&_e=-4JhNWlZkonYUlcnOrcAZICZ9ZII6D50PxW3eOtTvG50NJTs1jBTymrE1h-Jo5GHsbWxUoZXTLg2UNHB47Wc6yG1PB7H0PJajalOTkPuoO4zdwi95mjD_Vw0I0ZbXb21tFTy8bi7n-qJ4Q-AJRI3Z22RC7ufDnlRqbhaCu_p_QnI0JBEmnDnT-00Z68SYx-iqQ2cFL7UL0zU07OCmu4XnVQ6cHiakd0u1zvpfkBnfp6L29PDURIMSoUAMG5P4s7tZu5XjpMeiXFjXMjJWKo2m_Z30nSuizutfrLrLATmd_SUdIShoejxagFpPUbGtHCGfJUkLUlhOoa-BWDeH6EzfTnNLPaHaChI2aj6mWnFq4TaGqaWprMxf20V9R_37cBlg1i_HOaIJhzLh5IBlxLdgP0xghq_KG1rjh9M8EoC8c3aCUGpHXrWDrW-69GF0wkw4jZamkIL2EUVs0l3gG2o2w%3D%3D)
Thank you,
Mike Gallagher

Friend ー did you catch Biden’s Town Hall the other week? If not, this article from the _New York Post_ sums it up perfectly.

⬇⬇⬇

[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=66b2f253222d4e3fbde7f6e79d8303dd&_e=0dyjqciCV9E4jJDMjTVTZQfv78VLnr3S9Ap3tKMQKIFZHA_NL2xPB9xJpNswtVwkqpXV1jyUl8KWprG5YV1oFCpdTJE7XM-nDtSiFC7sfAyoMqLLXi5gpumAmxLkD8fSOQzb5wAhlMPHtS14hDfP5tKN_30zPqb7-_963yO3o7L_cRS4l_qivx4lTVE5Acu7wgvKBFbt3EubLMvb01jE7ALs7TlkGm-Fzb0A3SiCq1qhUI4qGw91KS-s11eW54ka8wr-7dXbz1VouQFLDEkYwOVOk1QP9r1cwUwpeISiAOXluog5tReUS4-r0bJlvEG2PB6I7_GMVDVFGWSJQDZjF8pacMC9rNzKrK23tDUVIcr3PG8JPdhpfXxzf12xEzgdD3-_flG89R6P9YnAfWIZjhxodml-OH3NuiBsZLaXDKQ6dMbu5rsP2z2t_BvTqbui6xK6VO_aI74Mws6YlLvTmlcPIB71CmWszFzAMl6VogY%3D)

Joe Biden told the restaurant owner ‘we kept you open’ after advocating for lockdowns for nearly a year.

Then he said, ‘you’re going to be in a bind unless you pay your workers more’ with no mention of the fact that his government is still handing out cash for people not to go back to work.

We’re not that surprised Biden doesn’t understand the plight of small businesses;******_he’s never built anything and has been a drain on the American taxpayer his entire career._ **

**It’s time to send Joe packing. **

According to the quarterly fundraising reports released earlier this month, the Wisconsin Democrats are continuing to shovel in money from out-of-state coastal liberals who want to make Wisconsin the next California.
