name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: John's story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John and Gisele are so incredibly grateful for every donation — big or small.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210730-2167-header&t=1&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
Peter, let's just say that John Fetterman wouldn't exactly blend in with the other Senators...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=2&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
_This man really hates wearing a suit._
But that's kind of the point. He's not your "typical" politician, and he hasn't followed the traditional path for running for office either. He served for 13 years as Mayor of Braddock, after winning by a single vote.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=3&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
_A single provisional ballot. That's it._
Oh, and he's also raising his family across from Andrew Carnegie's first steel mill.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=4&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
_John, Gisele, Karl, Gracie, August, and Levi_
Now, John is our single best chance to flip this open Senate seat from red to blue. Why? Because he hasn't had to "evolve" on the issues like other politicians have.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=5&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
_John defied PA law in order to officiate LGBTQ+ marriages while it was still illegal._
Pennsylvanians like that. They know what he's about and what he stands for. Plus, we know he'll ALWAYS fight on the side of workers + their families — because he's funded by over a quarter of a million small-dollar donations, not giant corporations or their PACs.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=6&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
_Here's a map of every Team Fetterman grassroots donor from across our Commonwealth._
**But with our end-of-month fundraising deadline just a day away, we're running out of time to close the gap on our $102,769 July goal.** [** _Will you chip in your first $5 before tomorrow at midnight to directly fund our urgent + crucial campaign priorities so we can send John Fetterman to fight for us in the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=7&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)**
Thanks in advance for your help!
— Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. CNN recently rated this open Pennsylvania Senate seat as the #1 Most Likely to Flip in 2022. We've got a real shot at sending John to the U.S. Senate, but that will require reaching every big fundraising benchmark like the one we set for tomorrow at midnight. [** _Will you pitch in $5 right now to help out? John and Gisele are so incredibly grateful for every donation — big or small._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25612?refcode=em20210730-2167&t=27&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210730-2167-footer&t=28&refcode2=2167_434096_eqVilu&akid=2167%2E434096%2EeqVilu)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: John and Gisele are so incredibly grateful for every donation — big or small. Peter, let's just say that John Fetterman wouldn't exactly blend in with the other Senators... This man really hates wearing a suit. But that's kind of the point. He's not your "typical" politician, and he hasn't followed the traditional path for running for office either. He served for 13 years as Mayor of Braddock, after winning by a single vote. A single provisional ballot. That's it. Oh, and he's also raising his family across from Andrew Carnegie's first steel mill. John, Gisele, Karl, Gracie, August, and Levi Now, John is our single best chance to flip this open Senate seat from red to blue. Why? Because he hasn't had to "evolve" on the issues like other politicians have. John defied PA law in order to officiate LGBTQ+ marriages while it was still illegal. Pennsylvanians like that. They know what he's about and what he stands for. Plus, we know he'll ALWAYS fight on the side of workers + their families — because he's funded by over a quarter of a million small-dollar donations, not giant corporations or their PACs. Here's a map of every Team Fetterman grassroots donor from across our Commonwealth. But with our end-of-month fundraising deadline just a day away, we're running out of time to close the gap on our $102,769 July goal. Thanks in advance for your help! — Team Fetterman HQ P.S. CNN recently rated this open Pennsylvania Senate seat as the #1 Most Likely to Flip in 2022. We've got a real shot at sending John to the U.S. Senate, but that will require reaching every big fundraising benchmark like the one we set for tomorrow at midnight. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Patty Murray (personal)
subject: It’s all on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We have a huge fundraising deadline coming up on Saturday -- so I’m asking this team to step up and help us compete with the Republicans’ big haul because I know that the power of the grassroots is stronger than any special interests.
#
I’ll keep this short, Peter:
From Spokane to Seattle and everywhere in between, I am constantly hearing from constituents about the need to not just get back to the way things were before this pandemic, but to level the playing field for working families and build back fairer and stronger.
So every day in the other Washington, I am fighting to make progress for families in Washington state on issues like affordable health care, child care, education, paid leave, and much more.
But while I am working as hard as I can together with my Democratic colleagues to make real progress for the American people, the Republicans are gearing up for a fierce battle for control of the Senate. _In fact, the national GOP just dropped more than a million dollars on attack ads against Senate Democrats._
**We have a huge fundraising deadline coming up on Saturday -- so I’m asking this team to step up and help us compete with the Republicans’ big haul because I know that the power of the grassroots is stronger than any special interests. And we absolutely cannot let the GOP outraise and outspend us when there is this much on the line, Peter.**
**[I just set a $10,000 flash fundraising goal ahead of the end-of-month deadline. Patty

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Lance, Kris, Carolyn, Abby, and Brad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
On November 8th, 2022 we could have six more years of a senator who has failed Wisconsin workers and families, ignored science, refused to investigate the January 6th insurrection, pushed COVID-19 conspiracies, and called climate change “bulls---.”

OR...

We could have a senator who will roll up her sleeves to expand our health care, lower prescription drug costs, restore voting rights, raise the minimum wage, tackle the climate crisis -- and yes, get rid of the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get the job done.

Peter, this should be a no-brainer. Wisconsin workers and families deserve a senator who will fight for their interests, not the wealthy and well-connected. Since Ron Johnson isn’t up to the job, I’ll take his place -- but I’ll need the help of supporters like you every step of the way.

[**We’re falling a little behind on our goal of reaching 10,000 individual grassroots donors by midnight tomorrow. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more to help us get there before the end-of-month deadline expires?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33256905/298334020/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210730_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210730_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZkNTFjYi02ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o7hOTJItXXwqGLcktQPn3g0xjjun6By9ZUJggxFmc0Q=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33256906/298334078/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210730_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210730_EOM6_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZkNTFjYi02ZmYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o7hOTJItXXwqGLcktQPn3g0xjjun6By9ZUJggxFmc0Q=)

Unlike Ron Johnson, I'll never forget where I came from and who I'm fighting for. It’s people like Lance, a teacher in Eau Claire; Kris, a librarian from Rhinelander; Carolyn, a physician from Pittsville; Abby, a student in Burlington, and Brad who’s an engineer in Madison -- everyday folks who deserve every opportunity to succeed.

Thank you for being part of this team. Your dedication and support for a better future for Wisconsin is the backbone of this campaign and I wouldn't be here without you by my side.

Forward!

Sarah Godlewski

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. clean_body: On November 8th, 2022 we could have six more years of a senator who has failed Wisconsin workers and families, ignored science, refused to investigate the January 6th insurrection, pushed COVID-19 conspiracies, and called climate change “bulls---.” OR... We could have a senator who will roll up her sleeves to expand our health care, lower prescription drug costs, restore voting rights, raise the minimum wage, tackle the climate crisis -- and yes, get rid of the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get the job done. Peter, this should be a no-brainer. Wisconsin workers and families deserve a senator who will fight for their interests, not the wealthy and well-connected. Since Ron Johnson isn’t up to the job, I’ll take his place -- but I’ll need the help of supporters like you every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Unlike Ron Johnson, I'll never forget where I came from and who I'm fighting for. It’s people like Lance, a teacher in Eau Claire; Kris, a librarian from Rhinelander; Carolyn, a physician from Pittsville; Abby, a student in Burlington, and Brad who’s an engineer in Madison -- everyday folks who deserve every opportunity to succeed. Thank you for being part of this team. Your dedication and support for a better future for Wisconsin is the backbone of this campaign and I wouldn't be here without you by my side. Forward! James,

Is your wallet feeling a little emptier than usual these days?

**It probably is, thanks to Joe Biden.**

**[If that makes you angry, click here to do something about it!>>>](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=84c0dce863dc46c8b7fbe4911e10ac72&_e=grn9Vxf-ruJ-zJzUmVCnpJ-Gp5XKHdhQTLWE23USUHgP9ul1QDyKhQj__NN2AU5QqNETgknVuMYXj70w__HYZAYO8OlFPX5sgRAM225iFb6w25KOJN7VAw7FilvyPYX6Z7Kvxw8ZheuGA6Cz_zzlYdukMps-30eszvHK_pDYdw6uvrCkkxJJhfvjonz2qKDGHWy9xmhFSVGfo-2TEdTwms2RgYycH0OR5fBBAhljnybQaLKYaHflDX_MZPtcYOF2Y9TulrPds6Q8VcJiGkESDbyZ_3JFwfCfttBhvFI8QLI_7CLGxct83A8CChL-rCQGIkAJJDQraDm45fvzca4kuDjb3n0ZgK0KPet-vKrxOp8hOkl_x7wqfFB5h1KE_kRo0XzOaDa0CdZgHypRRApl0BgR5gllDzXEOD-lwG8urMdxSJ19MlajccpxCzL-6NbdC24KJ3AE548iHe3ICsrmLKLtxn9QgRM-Q-BwaVOH9yTiYL_c_Gd1oPglO-bgxxkp)**

Joe Biden thinks we can spend our way out of this economic crisis. Anyone with an ounce of common sense knows that will never work, but that’s not stopping old Joe from doing it anyway.

_The result?_

Gas prices have skyrocketed. So have grocery bills. As have childcare costs. And housing. And just about everything else, too.

**Thank goodness he saved us 16¢ on our Independence Day cookouts, because Lord knows we’re going to need it!**

Harold Earls knows how much Biden’s failed economic policies are costing everyday Americans because he is one. Like you, he’s trying to stretch every dollar a little farther. And like you, Harold is frustrated that our leaders in Washington don't seem to care at all.

**That’s exactly why he’s running for Congress, James - to be the leader who cares enough to fight for you and your family. **

name: Team Schrier
subject: 56 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Fifty-six years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed Medicare and Medicaid into law -- helping to ensure seniors and low-income families had access to the affordable, quality health care they deserve. Today, Medicare and Medicaid provide health care coverage to millions of Americans across the country, including more than 1.6 million Washingtonians. body:
Your support means the world to the Gov.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3h~vE78FR/aDlLOG5zRFl2d01ualNQZkpVVjJ6RHQ4WEZCUXBKYlc3SG9lb0xyY2p6NlN1UDdtc1ZnaWl6Z1hZYkFVMGJNSEZkZDJPUXZYL05IMXpNZ25mbUdhZ1Q2cGt4WVdLRkk0c3haRGNveERKbzQ9S0/Z2liekRySnU0RzZwVTk5KzdVM1g5dGhBa2lSR2dQYWZVaTB0UDNSY3Fvdz0S1) Friend, People are calling 2021 the summer of climate change -- and they're absolutely right. But in Washington state, it's also the year of climate action. Thanks to your support, we've made real headway in the fight against the climate crisis. Just this year, we passed a new Clean Fuel Standard and created a cap-and-invest program to cut emissions across our economy. And we enacted one of the strongest environmental justice policies in the nation, giving members of frontline communities a voice in policy design and investment decisions. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Urgent circumstances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Pf4pA8aPl5BqTUZkcK90HfEMeROs%2FR0q&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I understand there's a lot going on right now: The GOP is relentlessly attacking voting rights, _Roe v. Wade_ is in serious jeopardy of being overturned, and key components of President Biden's progressive agenda hang in the balance. **But it 's exactly because of these urgent circumstances that I'm counting on your support.**
My end-of-month fundraising deadline is just around the corner, and if we continue at our current pace, we will come up $6,200 short of our goal.
With so much on the line, I need to be honest about why we cannot let that happen. The Senate Republican campaign committee just posted their single biggest fundraising haul in a non-election year. They brought in close to $30 million that they can deploy at the behest of Mitch McConnell to expand the electoral playing field and target blue Senate seats like the one I hold. Their record fundraising could elevate my extremist opponent - someone who is loyal to no one except Donald Trump.
Friend, control of the Senate hangs in the balance - and with it, our ability to make progress for the American people. I'm counting on you to help me hit this end-of-month fundraising goal so we can defend my Democratic Senate seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate. So, if it is at all possible, I'm asking, please:
**[Will you make a donation of $5 or more now to protect this Senate seat from extremist Republicans and keep Senate control out of the hands of Mitch McConnell?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1053-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AsvENfkxb6YVjvdlRb459v3c3lalGox6&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

| | Peter, Around three million people tune in daily to watch Tucker Carlson. That means every time he invites a dangerous conspiracy theorist onto his show, three million people see them. Julie Kelly has appeared on Tucker Carlson Tonight ten times this year amidst the program's ratings surge. Following the House select committee's first hearing on the January 6 insurrection this week, Kelly took to Twitter to absurdly smear a heroic D.C. police officer as a partisan “crisis actor.” Tucker Carlson and Julie Kelly really think Americans will buy the idea that Officer Fanone is making this all up. The right-wing propaganda machine is desperate to distract Americans from Nancy Pelosi's historic investigation. Defamation, conspiracy theories, and 24/7 Fox punditry \-- all of these weapons are aimed right at our brave Democratic investigators. **This is a massive authoritarian assault on our democracy, and we can't afford to let it steamroll the committee's good work.** | **[PROTECT OUR INVESTIGATORS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33258920/298342571/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210730_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NTg2ZmVlLTc0ZjEtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vt__uapAKIKOmu3tXkBH1-xVd4iVheNmVa7FKXkEpb4=)**

body:

Peter, I’m on the road constantly in these last critical weeks before the Recall Election, but I just got word from my team and wanted to personally reach out. We are still behind our fundraising goal for the month and only have a few days left to reach it before the July 31st deadline. What we can do to get out the vote in the final weeks will be based on what we raise NOW. So, your immediate support is crucial. Can you help me and my campaign by chipping in $5, $50, $100 or whatever you can before midnight this Saturday? Just click here to make a secure online contribution: **[https://secure.anedot.com/faulconer-for-governor-2021/donate-eom](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/11b8b9a5b3c7236e/cf0d005679183020c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Thank you so much. clean_body: | Hi team, Fifty-six years ago today, President Johnson officially signed Medicaid into law, which has delivered health care to over 80 million Americans. But the fight for affordable health care didn’t end there. Our team at The Fairness Project is proud to have helped expand Medicaid in 6 red and purple states when obstructionist politicians refused to act. Today we’re celebrating Medicaid’s birthday. And we’re committed to keep fighting to expand health care -- because change can’t wait. | Change isn’t made by staying on the sidelines. We’re grateful to have you in this fight with us. Thanks, The Fairness Project Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. So I’ve dedicated my life to public service, in hopes of making a difference in my community.

As a State Senator I’ve looked beyond party labels to actually get things done for the folks I swore to serve -- like creating affordable housing and securing COVID relief funds for local small businesses.

And now I’m ready to bring that same approach to Congress.

[**Here’s what you need to know about my race:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33260142/298346229/1129282168?refcode=20210730_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQwMjlmNy03OGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWURVX2OIMF187aYBFDsdoQqpxcYPZbpQd1hLmzZPuE=) Through his votes, Congressman Don Bacon has shown us what his priorities are.

He voted against COVID relief.

He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

And he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations, instead of helping hardworking families.

It’s clear we need new leadership, but I’m going to need a huge team of grassroots supporters to help me pull this off.

**Attn Pelosi: It’s Time To Get Back To Work ⏰**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=227e03fb10c04adba0af7f7410ef8060&_e=SUt4_8aOC5gNdGI5EyK7ziHEKkNpSMJ9osxoAKT-_5CC4mLTjm2DKbwJRoQrRVO8b1c2AvX5WLh50TThemqhSyAQOCBDxYOtYadOnB_4pjhNYNPojZUpelNVRRf4TypQOQU78GoYTWgYIfV5EkF_pGmLEP5gcgw_AqEDzIlnNhqr1gy-7-NutP_TRzK-pSy5PnYe1w5rNczX1LPAVMrPldSx5tImy_LMzOnJRMWrUWPsFfdwqPGKk9g_YIZcMGGOcQHYeAQlQ-XRYNJpFFBnvZ7aWIiyeEN00XOwfB9vevk%3D)
It’s time for Nancy Pelosi to put an end to her coronavirus protocols.

The House returned to Washington last week, but members can still vote by proxy and attend hearings virtually. Many representatives didn’t even bother showing up. And those that did, weren’t _really_ there, if you get my drift. One representative was spotted waking up from a nap in the middle of a hearing, while another participated from a boat.

Proxy voting was instituted during the height of the pandemic, but now it’s being used by members to shirk their responsibilities. The vast majority of members are vaccinated and the COVID threat is greatly diminished.

It is an insult to taxpayers every time a House member skips official duties in Washington to go do something else. House members should show up to work and do their jobs, and it’s up to Speaker Nancy Pelosi to demand it.

**I wrote an op-ed in the _Wall Street Journal_ urging my fellow congressional members to show up for work. I hope you’ll read it at the link below.**

**Read more:** No-show lawmakers use Covid as an excuse ([_Wall Street Journal_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=227e03fb10c04adba0af7f7410ef8060&_e=SUt4_8aOC5gNdGI5EyK7zpyK0klbnj2YVD2Vxk7aYIe2_r2boop32PMNcMMfmZE6KvkPKg8KA6Pj3IYaHpLUhOTyKk_xAwm0qBWdpBQ0GXGqtYAbLI0u2lEKM-usdVx6xE9qUqQn33M_xdgJBbwWaYhoibawsoVuFKc-_eNWARUcOK8AQGrUekq-8_IvrtrKnN-jZ27KA80lDx1dIG3VBjhL-Nt295eUQLZq8Ur_hZCp1TvMrJ7lYlWaT5OWUjumopQBfPyY1uZnOU9uhBnU-MndsS6QNX9pkhc3Ib71QJOfZs6w_XS9jIDZ1LT_ZQEc_Vjl3MXui6mN8hpOqnNiLOv_wkaCly8Bop3Yfjh1y5doZIOjZhI4c-sfFdjeuhUB))

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Attn Pelosi: It’s Time To Get Back To Work ⏰ It’s time for Nancy Pelosi to put an end to her coronavirus protocols. The House returned to Washington last week, but members can still vote by proxy and attend hearings virtually. Many representatives didn’t even bother showing up. And those that did, weren’t really there, if you get my drift. One representative was spotted waking up from a nap in the middle of a hearing, while another participated from a boat. Proxy voting was instituted during the height of the pandemic, but now it’s being used by members to shirk their responsibilities. The vast majority of members are vaccinated and the COVID threat is greatly diminished. It is an insult to taxpayers every time a House member skips official duties in Washington to go do something else. House members should show up to work and do their jobs, and it’s up to Speaker Nancy Pelosi to demand it. I wrote an op-ed in the Wall Street Journal urging my fellow congressional members to show up for work. I hope you’ll read it at the link below. Read more: No-show lawmakers use Covid as an excuse () | Splashing Into Summer 💦 Nothing spells summer more than a brand new splash pad for East Tennessee’s kids. I was honored to attend the Lenoir City Splash Pad ribbon cutting and grand opening this past week. Located at Central Park, it was clear that this new addition is a great way to beat the summer heat. | Just For Fun 🎉 → Watch this viral video of hometown fans exploding with joy as an Alaskan teenager wins gold 🏅 () → This Australian swim coach has a lesson to teach us about celebrating victory 🙌 () → An Iranian defector dedicated his judo medal to Israel 🇮🇱 () | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fvh2DhMERHhGGeLOqx4cOiuL3FLXS2kU9SUdCQDu4mw=/V9ViLsVdXBRV4hvFhRB5X_pW1Xsxf4XIeLt3P_Ge7zY=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Did you see the email my team sent earlier this week? On Tuesday, we needed 200 donors to step up and contribute before July 31. I'm pleased to report we're well on the way to exceeding our goal with over 150 donations in-hand as of this morning! Please help put us over the top by [**_clicking here_** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fvh2DhMERHhGGeLOqx4cOiuL3FLXS2kU9SUdCQDu4mw=/V9ViLsVdXBRV4hvFhRB5X_pW1Xsxf4XIeLt3P_Ge7zY=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)before midnight tomorrow to help us meet our July fundraising goal.
I know my team explained earlier just how important your donation is, but let me reiterate.
We are holding onto the House majority by a razor-thin margin, and, after new district lines are drawn, that margin is expected to shrink even more.
I don't need to tell you, but if we lose the majority, all the progress we've made will stop, and we won't be able to continue our work on issues like gun violence prevention, infrastructure investment, or protecting the right to vote.
With so much on the line, there is no question we need to do all we can now to re-elect Democratic incumbents and preserve the House majority.
With the primary election less than a year away, we must prepare a strong campaign now and ensure we have enough funds to contact every voter by next June.
Please take a moment to [**_click here and contribute_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fvh2DhMERHhGGeLOqx4cOiuL3FLXS2kU9SUdCQDu4mw=/V9ViLsVdXBRV4hvFhRB5X_pW1Xsxf4XIeLt3P_Ge7zY=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) towards our voter outreach expenses.
Thank you for doing your part the maintain the House majority and contributing today.
Sincerely,
Salud

Friend, it’s easier to want to be a Communist in a free country than to fight to be free in a Communist country. clean_body: Friend, These last few weeks, we’ve seen brave revolutionaries stand up to the Communist regime in Cuba. They are putting everything they have on the line for a chance at freedom. Friend, it’s easier to want to be a Communist in a free country than to fight to be free in a Communist country. As we approach our End of Month fundraising deadline for July, I want to remind you of how incredible it is to live in a country that is defined by its freedom. America is the greatest country in the world, I believe that, and it’s hard to see people disagree despite knowing nothing about the world beyond our borders. Do you want America’s nickname as “Land of the Free” to remain true? Help me fight to keep Communism OUT of our government and contribute NOW: If you agree with me, chip in $5, $10, or anything you can to help me continue to keep America free. Thank you, Nick Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: 3 donations needed from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, we set a critical end-of-month fundraising goal: 2,000 contributions to keep our people-first movement strong and to fully support Pramila's advocacy for us in Congress at such a pivotal moment.
[**Based on the number of Team Jayapal supporters in****the 18326 zip code, we just need three people in your area to make a contribution of $3 or more so we can hit our goal before midnight tomorrow. Can you be one of them today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210730?refcode=em20210730-506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=506_420207_zD8Qtv&akid=506%2E420207%2EzD8Qtv)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210730?refcode=em20210730-506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=506_420207_zD8Qtv&akid=506%2E420207%2EzD8Qtv)**
Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the grassroots and the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. **She relies on supporters like you, chipping in any amount to make a difference.**
If we dig deep and reach this goal, we can continue building an unprecedented grassroots movement to move Pramila's bold and transformative advocacy for a big spending bill that expands Medicare, fights climate change, invests in working people, and so much more. But what we’re able to accomplish in the weeks and months ahead hinges on hitting this goal.
[**Be one of the three supporters we need in****the 18326 zip code to contribute now. With so much on the line for working families, we can't afford to fall short of this month’s goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210730?refcode=em20210730-506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=506_420207_zD8Qtv&akid=506%2E420207%2EzD8Qtv)
Every little bit helps. Thank you for making a gift today,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210730-506-footer&t=23&refcode2=506_420207_zD8Qtv&akid=506%2E420207%2EzD8Qtv)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:

| I wasn’t planning on emailing you today, but this is too important to wait:

In just 24 hours, I’m facing my End of Month Deadline, and without your help, **I’ll fall short of my can’t-miss goal.**

**That could spell disaster for my campaign and our Democratic House Majority.**

name: Darryn Harris, Team Bass
subject: Read this real quick, please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to debunk the FAKE SCIENCE Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are using to force new COVID mandates on the American people. I also called on Americans to defy any dictatorial orders from Joe Biden and Democrat leaders who want to lock down the country again. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | WHAT SCIENCE? | == | == So Joe Biden wants EVERYONE to wear a mask again. Regardless if you are vaccinated. Joe says he's "following the science." What science? Here's the truth: The "game changer" data the CDC used for the mask mandate is BS. The data is from a single study from India. That study followed healthcare workers who were vaccinated with a vaccine NOT EVEN APPROVED IN THE UNITED STATES. So they're not even using a study that can be applied to vaccinated Americans here in the United States. == What's worse? The study was rejected in peer review. But the CDC used it anyway. And here's the most egregious part: Biden officials are admitting PUBLICLY that they don't have ANY EVIDENCE that vaccinated Americans can transmit COVID-19. This is the "science" Democrat leaders are following to force tyrannical COVID policies on the American people once again. But I'm going to fight back. == | | | == | | | | == | | | | NO MORE MANDATES. NO MORE LOCKDOWNS. | == | == Let me say this right now, because we all know where Joe and Nancy are headed: If any socialist tries to impose lockdowns again, don't comply. Restaurants. Businesses. Schools. No one should comply. == We need to prepare to fight back NOW. If Joe Biden can use FAKE SCIENCE to impose new mask mandates, he will use FAKE SCIENCE to impose new lockdowns. It's that simple. == The White House is strongly indicating that they will "follow the science" even if that science says lockdowns are the answer. But here's the deal: They can't force us into lockdowns if we stick together. That's why I'm going to mobilize Americans through a vast messaging campaign to make sure NO AMERICAN IS LOCKED DOWN AGAIN. By getting the truth to as many people as possible, Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi won't be able to ignore our voices. I need your help to get this messaging campaign off the ground. I NEED YOUR HELP TO KEEP AMERICANS FREE. == | | | | THIS IS ABOUT PUBLIC HEALTH. NOT PUBLIC CONTROL. | == | == If you're wondering what could possibly be the motivation behind these new calls for mandates and lockdowns from the socialist left, it's this: Democrats are authoritarians who want control over your lives. They want you scared. They want you locked down. They never want the pandemic to end. Why? Because they think as long as there is a pandemic they will be able to control every decision you make in your lives. They want you dependent on the government, because they believe the government is your savior. == But Ronald Reagan was always right: Government is not the solution to the problem. Government is the problem. The best thing the government can do right now is LEAVE. PEOPLE. ALONE. Let Americans live their lives, deal with risk how they see fit, and provide for their families without government interference. That's what I'm fighting for and I WILL NOT LET JOE BIDEN OR NANCY PELOSI TAKE YOUR FREEDOMS. == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS FOX NEWS: == FOX BUSINESS: == DAILY WIRE: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. clean_body: We only have a few hours left to meet our July goal... Hi Peter, There are only a few hours left on the clock until we hit our July deadline, and we must meet our end-of-month goal. Derek is running in a crucial California swing district that will prove vital in our fight for the Green New Deal and Medicare For All. His pivotal vote in Congress is at stake if we fail to hit this milestone. = We do not have time to wait. Right now, we are in the middle of another massive heatwave that is sending people to the hospital. CA-08’s current representative is the typical Republican who fails to take this issue seriously—despite our district being on the frontline of the climate crisis. This is why Derek is running for office. If we’re serious about fighting the climate crisis and saving people’s lives, we need bold leaders like Derek in Washington. We do not have time to wait. Friend – Every summer we see the same thing happen. People go away on vacation, spend more time outdoors, or simply take a much-needed break from their computers. We're very glad people are getting time off, especially this year! But it also leads to a dip in fundraising– and this month has been no exception. **On top of that, Donald Trump JUST jumped into our race to encourage Mitch McConnell's top pick to run against Maggie.** It isn't random that Donald Trump decided to target us – he and the rest of the GOP believe the path to taking back the Senate runs through New Hampshire. clean_body: | | | Friend – Every summer we see the same thing happen. People go away on vacation, spend more time outdoors, or simply take a much-needed break from their computers. We're very glad people are getting time off, especially this year! But it also leads to a dip in fundraising– and this month has been no exception. On top of that, Donald Trump JUST jumped into our race to encourage Mitch McConnell's top pick to run against Maggie. It isn't random that Donald Trump decided to target us – he and the rest of the GOP believe the path to taking back the Senate runs through New Hampshire. And they will continue to attack Maggie until they flip this seat. With Trump's fundraising machine now focused on New Hampshire, it's critical that we meet our July fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Republicans are already spending BIG in the Granite State, and with the new focus from Trump and his base, millions more in dark money are guaranteed to be spent against us. = Thank you for your support. – Meg Platt, Finance Director | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Save America
subject: URGENT: Redistricting Meeting August 4th
body:
We need your help to testify at the CD7 Redistricting Meeting on August 4th in Golden, CO!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMB-Fc02PkaTO0LpWSAe_93ZqeYyaC6TkKeF24QAMPnhthlscdt2QpBrr4oV5ViouPhD4Gn_448INrJZ0Hr8jGwSCrsf44u6uqYH4UctW5dFz71rJA9v6aYVPaKkMWHhsODksMq-Jxo0eqajLjWuWTyy3g6674_s&c=RewO_2k-c3M_ltwQ1wquoCNS1bL5jhmSyNfWpkA66mke8W1Gs4Z6wg==&ch=p8TWHeCvVMFVdMEfBdcqMreNyvuQtcnc3ZI-7H4_DB9hgcO3b0mXoQ==)
---
| Fellow Coloradan, I am once again contacting you to ask you to perform your Civic duty.
We only have 2 more opportunities to testify on the proposed Congressional and Legislative District lines in Colorado.
During the Public Comment Periods on the new lines, the Democrats have controlled the narrative at the meetings, claiming the new lines aren't fair and that they should be changed back to more favorable lines for the Democrats.
At the last meeting, we were outnumbered 10 to 1 by Teachers Union cronies sent to testify. All they wanted was Jefferson County to be a Democrat stronghold, not caring about any communities of interests or constitutional requirements. They also refuted the idea that Douglas County shared any "common interests" with Jefferson County.
They attacked the lines under the guise of school districts being split up that weren't ever being split by the commission or the proposed lines.
The reason I am contacting you today is to ask you to step up and help us secure these proposed lines, that are fair for both sides. We must show the commission that we know these lines are fair for all involved and that Colorado wants to keep them the way they were proposed. Right now all they are hearing is that they aren't fair and that they must be changed, and we can not let that continue.
The next public comment hearing on the CD7 and Legislative Lines will be on Wednesday, August 4th at 7:00 PM at Golden High School. I am asking you to join us for training on how to testify, before the meeting via zoom, and then to testify on the 4th at the meeting.
Testifying at these meetings is not a scary thing, at these meetings, your comment is welcomed and wanted. Not at all like Testifying at your local School Board or the State House.
However, these meetings do take a very long time due to the volume of people testifying. So please come prepared for a long evening.
If you don't step up and fight for these new district lines, you will be handing control of the House back to Nancy Pelosi in 2022 and you will be giving the Democrats an unfair advantage all across Colorado for the next 10 years.
If the Democrats get what they want, they will take away the competitive districts that Colorado was given and replace them with safe districts that they will call fair.
Here at Prodigy, we believe in fair district lines that represent everyone in Colorado. Not just one or two parties controlling the entire state. Our country was founded on the freedom to chose, and it is the right of everyone in Colorado to be able to choose their representatives via a free and fair election, where their vote truly matters.
This is not a large ask, we are simply asking for a few hours of your time so that you can help Save America and Secure Colorado for Victory once again.
I want to thank you for your time and I hope you will be joining us at the training and will testify at the meeting on August 4th.
---
| | | [Sign Up for Training and to Testify Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMB-Fc02PkaTO0LpWSAe_93ZqeYyaC6TkKeF24QAMPnhthlscdt2QuBj_VZa5mCwl4_L1SKU0KlXN8bD7hfoIRZRxQ5HgkeoyOtDF_OXbcm_OIh9zeKbKaUU3yzxtjN-lWkZLWVel8Ul4AqoOfDFlWWiSFKI-zpy6g6vLfJdT4iUT4_dmVrWxMkz8VoiRrTNX1RuEmQH9Pt5n-3kB24GU_RNV04Xp1g9to9NquOWFDkBvY6xfggFCMceP13FzbPd6j0PQXmpW9ytLBo83owtysxsnPRsHZqsIN4Qjjobzo5fTmKgRO9B8oPDaZr1Kgb64qWQF2RZzL9fF5cpwu48tA7V8bk_kEBG&c=RewO_2k-c3M_ltwQ1wquoCNS1bL5jhmSyNfWpkA66mke8W1Gs4Z6wg==&ch=p8TWHeCvVMFVdMEfBdcqMreNyvuQtcnc3ZI-7H4_DB9hgcO3b0mXoQ==)
---
| Sincerely,
Weston D, Imer Founder and CEO Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMB-Fc02PkaTO0LpWSAe_93ZqeYyaC6TkKeF24QAMPnhthlscdt2QhvVNDYx7icbCs88K4Ht-hOvcAU5GVgt7zt8mCJ8nmjVs3nSy5lBWhU1d7vIhA2WKwws1bTcXnOworITNQ_ZCm1wO9W3VKSILJKX7BTiJ3XHSsLhjKxeAF8=&c=RewO_2k-c3M_ltwQ1wquoCNS1bL5jhmSyNfWpkA66mke8W1Gs4Z6wg==&ch=p8TWHeCvVMFVdMEfBdcqMreNyvuQtcnc3ZI-7H4_DB9hgcO3b0mXoQ==)

body:
| | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgZRNwS~) |
It's Adam Schiff. I'm coming to you for the first time this month to ask you to make a critical contribution:

**Will you chip in before the End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to help defend our majority? We cannot let Republicans outraise us by millions to overtake our House majority. **
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 7/31, 11:59pm
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $1_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwpR-)
---

This is why your $3 is critical:

- House Republicans have broken**FOUR** monthly fundraising records in a row.
- They have **$55 MILLION** in the bank ready to unleash on our vulnerable Democrats at a moment's notice.
- And the latest polls have them **AHEAD** in the race to win the majority.

Make no mistake: **We must band together and stop a Republican takeover. And your support today can help us do that.**

Can I count on your help to chip in $3 before our End of Month Deadline to protect House Democrats and our slim majority?
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)

Adam Schiff

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. Not only is the CDC recommending masks and social distancing in our schools this upcoming year, but the Capitol Police (aka Nancy Pelosi!) announced that staff and visitors can be ARRESTED for not wearing a mask on capitol grounds. Have they lost their minds?! [**NO MASKS MANDATES!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rk1VBMl7Z5HIProYLVVCWPvlUiypWnb-TzbnH5mI1fefMhpdUmLgMn1XCV9RjX3ztY&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=no_mask_mandate&n=2) LET. | | **Chief's Brief: July Progress**
---
| | Approximately, 18 hours ago I sent out our first briefing to keep you in the loop on our progress in achieving our July fundraising goals. The last 18 hours have been solid, but we have more work to do over the next 12 hours. Here is where things stand now:
* **_We are only short 21 individual contributors_** to reach our goal for July--_we've already surpassed June's numbers by 62 donors_ and we've **more than doubled** May's numbers. Thank you to all of you who've stepped up in the past and who've stepped up for us now.
* **_We are only short $4,103.50_** to reach our July fundraising goal. _We have already surpassed June's fundraising number_ and we are just shy of **doubling** May's fundraising numbers. Again, I cannot share with you how much it means to me to know that I have your support--especially, in these difficult economic times.

We have 12 hours to go to get this done. _I know we can do it!_ We have always executed in the past and I have no reason to believe that we will not execute this time.
I am on my way to Snohomish County to speak at an event this evening. The patriots on the west side of the state love our country and our state as much as you do and it's my honor to encourage them tonight. Please keep me in your prayers as I travel today. I am in contact with my team and I will send out another briefing to you tonight around 6:00 pm or a little after.
Onward and upward. Thank you for standing up for America.
Loren
END BRIEF###

Susie hears it all the time on the campaign trail: “Politics is really overwhelming right now.”
Partisan games, dysfunction, and gridlock leave many Americans feeling like there isn’t a path forward for some of our country’s toughest challenges.
That’s why when Susie ran for Congress, she promised to roll up her sleeves and do the work of bringing people together to find solutions for working families.
Together, we’ve created a strong and diverse coalition to fight for expanded access to health care, a cleaner environment, and a more equitable education system -- but we still have a lot of work to do.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is my first deadline since announcing my run against Ilhan Omar. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6e935c699fa4d41860fbd31c7f916a3&_e=k2at7o5kzAs0BhTwPWrggni0Vi-aPqNJgZ3XS1XihuPPx5XjcwPcTAArY-8kWfIcmp70NSKuVxD_uxRrrrM7GJxGUK0e06B78t7PSyBAxwGHxVj0mpW7o9lIJRi2-QW-r89OHAxGHgpGK5c2wrPQ84vkVIUHB8ooTiPTmmBgQ701amIGCPqBA6GDGQqq08uxJZw3_HIhBMAQN1zC_DhYugBWTSVptsFk80EuzV22MGwLAItQSjqQz0XD63U2UttmisisW3t2ma1iOC7HprnQg8wjUQOldXbKkXTsigCqq7Od0v5Izo-pdGKx3lyHXPr80GSLYrx29Sdik0Qs7LX26kCMp0qjktSmw-cfo9BL_H-_-1jFgBTDWMBeQ7XrJ6MHmCwg9sIvUyXz5wrkUqKLwA%3D%3D)

---

Peter,

The end of July is coming up fast and [**I need your help to make sure we hit the ground running.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6e935c699fa4d41860fbd31c7f916a3&_e=k2at7o5kzAs0BhTwPWrggni0Vi-aPqNJgZ3XS1XihuPPx5XjcwPcTAArY-8kWfIcmp70NSKuVxD_uxRrrrM7GJxGUK0e06B78t7PSyBAxwGHxVj0mpW7o9lIJRi2-QW-r89OHAxGHgpGK5c2wrPQ84vkVIUHB8ooTiPTmmBgQ701amIGCPqBA6GDGQqq08uxC0NiYuip6RgcJlmNaNbr3GezMNpfP01102icuJgQfL28wsVwhyfE8KMWHx-ITD68ITVbXP9sr0osLI35VGZ5DC0fFrr4RSKx54rGX47Zftc-2mv0LGs7YTwLf6wOKRaJwZNQGY3p5Z4v_swhWTe9HNOWbhRTjXPJHJBTbb4WJlUeFNgi8gc1Rf9jVtP4GXaXfPMzsUIJCERZyQXXba4qNw%3D%3D)

This will be my first deadline since announcing my run against Ilhan Omar, and everyone from Mainstream Media to Liberal Super PACs are watching to see if we can compete with the millions Ilhan Omar has raised from the radical Left to prop up her campaign.

**I’ve set a goal of raising another $50,000 before midnight on Saturday.** I know with the support of folks just like you, we can send a clear message to the Left.

**Let’s give them something to fear,
Peter. **

Let’s show the Left every Republican from across this great nation supports a patriot instead of a hate-spewing radical like Ilhan Omar. [**We can prove that we have what it takes to kick Omar out of Congress and to get our nation back to pursuing the American Dream but need your support before midnight on Saturday.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f6e935c699fa4d41860fbd31c7f916a3&_e=k2at7o5kzAs0BhTwPWrggni0Vi-aPqNJgZ3XS1XihuPPx5XjcwPcTAArY-8kWfIcmp70NSKuVxD_uxRrrrM7GJxGUK0e06B78t7PSyBAxwGHxVj0mpW7o9lIJRi2-QW-r89OHAxGHgpGK5c2wrPQ84vkVIUHB8ooTiPTmmBgQ701amIGCPqBA6GDGQqq08uxfHNRD0cjc-DBAivENy9IhsXVbQoluDtjYdQsLcMkUXzASOMRkRmwnGp7fcxL99ZKGt4EhfxOODeumk228HEuhk2sf2urSNCbI5pdsAxbjIngnxDWyzNLJQB970iV5J1h7PkUeMPSQ_dBMRdy7uHy2EEI96RJebBJuN9DCFBw_nS-YbtZmJ-CfHXcdLtzgngAHazGjcoBt-w9qeHg3rGyzA%3D%3D)

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **__**Speaker Dick Hinch: In Memory **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**,**
**
**This newsletter is extra close to our hearts as we dedicate it in memoriam to Speaker Dick Hinch. Speaker Hinch was not only a passionate fighter for Republican causes, but a very dear friend to many across the state of New Hampshire. He dedicated a great deal of his time to our cause, and it is only appropriate that we continue to both acknowledge his efforts, as well as continue to keep on the fight in his legacy. ****

****As you read today’s newsletter, please take a moment to appreciate Speaker Hinch’s tremendous work and to remember the new feats accomplished under strong republican leadership like his own.**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
**Unfailingly positive and affable, Speaker Richard Hinch will live on in the hearts of NH Republicans in countless years to come. As a fighter for freedom and conservative values, Speaker Hinch was beginning his 7th term as state representative, having already served as Republican leader for multiple terms. ****

We would not have the Republican majority we have in this state without the effort and hard work of Speaker Hinch. The Speaker was instrumental in our 2020 election efforts and worked with a team of House Republicans, as well as the New Hampshire Republican Party, our State Senate Republicans, and Governor Chris Sununu to produce the ONLY legislative chamber flip during the 2020 cycle right here in New Hampshire.

****Republicans are fighting for Speaker Hinch’s legacy and our recently passed budget - one that cut taxes and expanded school choice - fulfills some of his closest held priorities. We honor Speaker Hinch today and everyday by making the Granite State a better place and protecting our New Hampshire Advantage. **

---

| **
****Concord, NH – Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after Biden Administration mentions door-to-door campaign targeted at unvaccinated Americans:
**
**_“This type of political strong-arm tactic would not be well received by citizens of the Granite State. Legislators in New Hampshire will continue the fight to protect patients’ privacy and fight against federal overreach. We are well on our way to getting families and businesses back on track. Vaccines are available to those wishing to get vaccinated, and this idea of going door-to-door to private homes is not something we would ever consider or welcome here.”_**

**
****Leader Osborne ****Statement**** on President Biden’s Vaccine Tactics**
___**“The Biden Administration has made it abundantly clear that they are not shy about intruding on Americans' right to medical privacy. The President’s call to begin targeting the doors of unvaccinated individuals is yet another reminder that this administration will trample our liberties if left unchecked. The Republican caucus remains committed to continuing our work to strengthen medical freedom and preserve privacy rights in New Hampshire. Granite Staters exercising their right to refuse a medical treatment should not be subject to an intimidation campaign at their doorstep. When the government tries to intrude on our households, it is up to us to slam the door in their face.”**_**

| **Republican Spotlight : Rep. Daryl Abbas**
---
| |
---
| | **This week’s Republican of the week is Representative Daryl Abbas.**
**Representing Rockingham, District 8, Rep. Abbas joined Governor Chris Sununu in the signing of House Bill 174 into law. As was inspired by their beloved cat Arrow, the bill requires that a report be made to the pet owner and/or to law enforcement in the case of collision between a vehicle and feline. Not only did Rep. Abbas sponsor this new legislation, but also titled it in their pet’s name as “Arrow’s Law”, requiring the same reporting for both dog and cat vehicle collisions. ****

****Thank you Rep. Abbas for your terrific work here in New Hampshire! We appreciate all your efforts to create transparency and closure for Granite State pet owners. **

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

In order for cannabis legislation like this to be passed, we MUST keep the Senate blue, and Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat is the #1 seat to flip. Protect it TODAY! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33267532/298372008/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjNmM1ZC05NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns_dWcYyyDMTSAYs3BYzRtXi1Z0gXG-JE5uR0k60s14=&emci=cd62c32c-9df0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9dbc6c5d-94f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33267533/298372011/-25160751?refcode=E10471-20210730-EOM3-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjNmM1ZC05NGYxLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns_dWcYyyDMTSAYs3BYzRtXi1Z0gXG-JE5uR0k60s14=) I’ve been working to legalize cannabis long before I was ever elected to office, and I am proud of the world-class medical cannabis program in Pennsylvania. But, it’s not enough. Over the past year, I was able to pass legislation that provided funds to make medical cannabis more affordable and accessible, but both my bipartisan adult-use bill and legislation to allow home grown medical cannabis are being held up by the GOP legislature. [**However, in order for legislation like this to be passed, we MUST keep the Senate blue, and Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat is the #1 seat to flip. name: Team AOC
subject: Personal link
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for the next campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210730-2308-header&t=1&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)
With only one day before our July fundraising deadline, we’re still short of our important goal.
Our campaign relies on small-dollar contributions from grassroots supporters like you who believe in the better world Alexandria is fighting for.
**Your first $3 contribution — especially before tomorrow’s deadline — would make a significant difference for our work together in the months to come. If you’re able, please make your first contribution below using your personal link:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-1?refcode=em-20210730-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-1?refcode=em20210730-2308-P&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2308_2526796_079v45&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)
Your contribution will help us prepare for a tough re-election in 2022. Our race was one of the most expensive races in the country last year — Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to unseat Alexandria.
In order to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting to pass the progressive policies needed to lift up working families — policies like a Green New Deal, student loan debt cancellation, a $15 minimum wage and more — **we need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for a competitive campaign.**
We still have a significant gap in fundraising to fill before tomorrow's deadline, but if everyone who is reading this email chips in $3 — or anything they can today — we’ll be able to catch up in no time. If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a contribution today?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-1?refcode=em-20210730-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-1?refcode=em20210730-2308-P&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2308_2526796_079v45&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-1?refcode=em20210730-2308-P&t=4&refcode2=2308_2526796_079v45&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210730-2308-P&t=5&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2308%2E2526796%2E079v45)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
It’s confirmed... Democrats are TERRIFIED of Republicans taking back the Senate. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e256b55fe06b4953851c491347fd19e8&_e=EElLDrpV01JHfDT601ZVTGq6ak0WOTg_G5YvRodFQV9Id7jCCdkHPAvY2-yV7Dv_8ChZ4iLxqEgTQOYCQtLswcs_aY52N-Q8X9DL2Z8ex6Ozf9_aXHzE9In9nHZ5Yir98spqbp1so6HXiCqqjstW1o3K7CPUcI4JAIrQbRLteBbU4XgMAiw-Hfb8yM1Alv6feLBXRPfg43WfTV_bMFaKQtdLrc_YCfxXnzKjwzEhms70RZFdwsOGs6Arl85_MAPmXWoeA025BxkGky1JwyKVTS-D2TL2RxozlYiHtlaKepR4mV9pk2E2B2GDvNYvEWewpMPo52vlIYKLLUIPALc4V0cE71znjSyTkRu-UhMevPmNZfneH_kEsfM3xjYJ3CAkrNofMScaN-jIAaZz78BxYYuJcnzYfH-PxEZAlyusk2gHzMz96I04uSOdkeLtYaKC)
---
Fellow Conservative,

It’s confirmed... **[Democrats are TERRIFIED of Republicans taking back the Senate.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e256b55fe06b4953851c491347fd19e8&_e=EElLDrpV01JHfDT601ZVTGq6ak0WOTg_G5YvRodFQV9Id7jCCdkHPAvY2-yV7Dv_8ChZ4iLxqEgTQOYCQtLswcs_aY52N-Q8X9DL2Z8ex6Ozf9_aXHzE9In9nHZ5Yir98spqbp1so6HXiCqqjstW1o3K7CPUcI4JAIrQbRLteBbU4XgMAiw-Hfb8yM1Alv6feLBXRPfg43WfTV_bMFaKQtdLrc_YCfxXnzKjwzEhms7OGOxNZxa3Khpj0sp7hXpmbxJ75aehRroABc-bmetmfMEc1ADvb_7ks-KI3TR_EXfh37Y3lyTiSyiqbwUawM-_-p0sOABi7-xay7dyOTj02c0EZD0NOBVjBGleK52JEKoiF8hAxLSo9zpuojNuyDm1n8WKQL2uBowd1B-s61BbzRK7hiU4S1WFxSEBJ6wNPwagpslsrkUPJ5fCdJrQOgRR)**

Radical Liberal billionaires like George Soros, Tom Steyer, and their allies are already dumping millions into Senate races across the country i**n hopes of saving the Democrats' razor thin majority.**

They are so threatened by our Republican efforts that they will do and spend anything to make sure we don’t succeed in the Midterm Election. Although I just won reelection last year, our work for the GOP is more important than ever - **[and I will still need the same grassroots support](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e256b55fe06b4953851c491347fd19e8&_e=EElLDrpV01JHfDT601ZVTGq6ak0WOTg_G5YvRodFQV9Id7jCCdkHPAvY2-yV7Dv_8ChZ4iLxqEgTQOYCQtLswcs_aY52N-Q8X9DL2Z8ex6Ozf9_aXHzE9In9nHZ5Yir98spqbp1so6HXiCqqjstW1o3K7CPUcI4JAIrQbRLteBbU4XgMAiw-Hfb8yM1Alv6feLBXRPfg43WfTV_bMFaKQtdLrc_YCfxXnzKjwzEhms4lrpQuXbnxL2u7UYPg8ClURR58iv0z31DqRvCm384xfYzgdvm3GMayFWFJnCcsuI-5tgp_c3eVxFrZv8vaZdqfAnNe9jif77Vga3E3ZusD4kJlvMLNegaHLZVRPXTmK5np2zOryemtWBOHINFxS44KHSyN0UGeXjsUMlgQVKZZjINKDB7IC_i6F_20u1_M3sTw8Vnw8g8qbdwySYZviZC-)** as last cycle to make sure Republicans take back the majority in the Senate.

**[As a leader within the Republican Party, I am on a mission to help our conservative candidates across the nation in their campaigns and ensure we have the resources we need to win in 2022- I need to lead the GOP to victory starting today, with you by my side.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e256b55fe06b4953851c491347fd19e8&_e=EElLDrpV01JHfDT601ZVTGq6ak0WOTg_G5YvRodFQV9Id7jCCdkHPAvY2-yV7Dv_8ChZ4iLxqEgTQOYCQtLswcs_aY52N-Q8X9DL2Z8ex6Ozf9_aXHzE9In9nHZ5Yir98spqbp1so6HXiCqqjstW1o3K7CPUcI4JAIrQbRLteBbU4XgMAiw-Hfb8yM1Alv6feLBXRPfg43WfTV_bMFaKQtdLrc_YCfxXnzKjwzEhms6fcc87FVvTaHfZU1YDVqZ4tX9ubmw8p2Z-uYLGEx7V72uJ3xKbY0E0ogETRCr7k2noJhF3F_AET_iOFtC-jXnuFOonhgmyEfZqQHCMaS2qGQZHt6RsPQx6NIkKuIBSS-YGyRYdDIbVNU-KicMNg-rbeS5YqEBEQ703gxbA_YGy6QFw8qqXZjcL1cAEQQfjGiYyjDam3A-xzPnol0b9tPO-)**

Since you played an integral role in our victory, I am asking you to help me repeat history across the nation and support our conservative candidates. **I am setting an end-of-month fundraising goal of $15,000 - all raised by grassroots conservatives like you, to help us lay the groundwork for GOP victories all across the nation.**

**[Can I count on you to pitch in just $10, $15 or even $25 right now? It’s up to you and me to make sure we DEFEAT the Democrats and WIN back our Senate majority. Please step up right now.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e256b55fe06b4953851c491347fd19e8&_e=EElLDrpV01JHfDT601ZVTGq6ak0WOTg_G5YvRodFQV9Id7jCCdkHPAvY2-yV7Dv_8ChZ4iLxqEgTQOYCQtLswcs_aY52N-Q8X9DL2Z8ex6Ozf9_aXHzE9In9nHZ5Yir98spqbp1so6HXiCqqjstW1o3K7CPUcI4JAIrQbRLteBbU4XgMAiw-Hfb8yM1Alv6feLBXRPfg43WfTV_bMFaKQtdLrc_YCfxXnzKjwzEhms7HNs5ppvhRc-xkMfuR1_NuK96tXL1SJayzFLjuhhEMM5zV12LQYvJduecywcUp07a65Je3X5tmM1DSeiXKBQrSIQsYrs5j_CQAhaAyOZz-DBGZJ48BFxncdqqWIMTe9XGH6zSaEz7XvzHa6Ca0TQScVQ4TKQJ3-6tvMescbp1MgjyO1ZO8GnzWr_JlJIxRp0mKs415NN0KR9q0ZpWbRn2I)**

I’m worried.

We cannot afford another two years of Abigail Spanberger as our Congresswoman. She was against the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, has called for an updated Federal Assault Weapons Ban and voted for President Trump’s impeachment. Who knows what radical idea she will bring next?

Spanberger has put our lives in constant danger and I’m concerned.

When Spanberger and the Democrats have had continued calls for defunding the police, open borders, and more wasteful spending. It concerns me for the future of our nation.
**Which is why I support Tina Ramirez for Congress.**

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane continued to traverse the state this week with stops in Summit, Ashtabula, Franklin, Greene, Putnam, and Hamilton Counties, just to name a few. Just like she did when she was Chair of the Ohio Republican Party, Jane is not afraid to put in the work to earn the vote of Ohio voters. Ohioans deserve a fighter and someone who will put in the work in the U.S. Senate and that is exactly what Jane is proving every day of this campaign. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Let's Stand Up for Our Kids** In an opinion piece posted to Townhall.com on Monday, Jane once again stood up for our children’s education. Whether it’s remote learning, mask mandates for children, vaccine requirements, or our schools’ curriculum, the time for parents to voice their concerns regarding their children’s education is now and Jane will carry your voice when she gets to Washington. You can read more below: “Democrats are interjecting big government where the family should be – and as a mom and a U.S. Senate candidate, I find that dead wrong. The recent recommendation by the American Academy of Pediatrics that children over the age of 2 should be wearing a mask to return to school, regardless of vaccination status, is insane. Joe Biden also ridiculously echoed this in a recent town hall in Ohio saying that all children under 12 should mask up. We know that the risk of mental health issues and developmental setbacks are much worse for children if they are in remote settings or not able to interact with their peers. We know that children can better connect when they see smiles from their teachers and their friends. And we know that learning is better when children can effectively communicate and be immersed in their education. The lost learning, lost socialization, and lost productivity of last year cannot be understated and must not be repeated. Its long-lasting impacts have only just started to come to light.” [Read the full piece here.](townhall.com/columnists/janetimken/2021/07/26/lets-stand-up-for-our-kids-against-leftist-overreach-indoctrination-n2593021) **From the Trail** Last Friday night, Jane joined Ashtabula County Commissioner Kathryn Whittington in support of her re-election at the C4 Shooting and Training Center. Kathryn always puts Ashtabula County first and is a great servant-leader for her community. Saturday Jane was thrilled to join the Summit County Republican Party for their Lincoln Day Dinner. Summit County Chairman Bryan Williams put on a fantastic event and it was great to see Donald Trump, Jr. back in the Buckeye State! [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9076422e0afa4ee189b234c6ac4dc604&_e=PTnS-8dcrvyENUu4LAaXNjGrEsDj4gWMWHgj5OroMu0be4m8LTeQVsZLnw-5hmCFchUX7rRvwYgOCr2mNvvpH4R5-wK0rXuUbRqtRWx-T_nhknbP-jO1z7c-KoWdhAKcc0lfMpXG93osG10kIVCOiIqAP16_CAGGL22bYCVFNHr9NN3NdS-GfUg6XimFlmGXyqHX22ITQCTgU4DsNVp-NtijAHgRG855fsYOVPYrHq-CXb6SlOzkh_KaMuwtA7cWLxmp8NLV1bhZMX2RdhG58cQhUroI-pZ3grJgANqaYAfZWuM1ShUnh4zKtvSfeT9A) Jane returned to Ashtabula County on Sunday for the Ashtabula County Republican Women’s Club Annual Picnic! The Greene County Republican Party hosted Jane at their Patriotic Pot Luck and Politicians on Monday evening. On Wednesday, Jane joined the Putnam County Republican Party to pass out BBQ Chicken Dinners for their annual event. It was great to see Putnam County Chairman Tony Schroeder and all the great patriots in Putnam County. The Forge Leadership Network works to train and educate young conservatives in national and international politics and professional development. Jane was proud to join them for their Showcase Reception where she shared why and how she got involved in conservative politics and why our country needs strong, young conservatives like them to get involved and fight for our values. This afternoon, Jane joined Ohio Supreme Court Justice Pat Fischer for his first ever Fifth Fischer Friday event in Hamilton County. **Timken: Ohio, America First** The Mount Vernon News covered Jane’s America First campaign this week. Jane spoke about the major issues she sees as she travels the state. “I travel around the state of Ohio, and I talk to so many businesses that can't find enough people to come back to work. And many manufacturing-based companies do not have enough people to actually produce the products that they need to sell to their customers. Which then in turn causes supply chain issues which also contributes to our inflationary situation right now,” she told the Mount Vernon News. Ohio had a labor shortage problem before the pandemic, with many job openings but not enough workers with the required skills. She wants to redirect the focus to training kids in high school and community colleges to match the skills needed in their local communities.” [Read the full story here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9076422e0afa4ee189b234c6ac4dc604&_e=PTnS-8dcrvyENUu4LAaXNr0OV7-g1nwhCleQ4qhxiVd0jZZ-gMDR7od6N_dDGlhneX3zIkF02p62svcGMWc1-C1D0uN3Ufv6Msxu8FvqXSevZAu3gRIXo1ApdXgMc__WbX6wlSRsLMDmDXDvqAKiCekXPyFmYOtDSuCyOT5Se_k1I5ehL0metAft64NZRk_rKOBCX3mnBnJ3AOPC-QtSjTRWfg-rq1kfBhBZEgTOur_qvX31xJ23IjjWvv5spZVRnQy3qv30t3DWvGKS8gfzj07sgnO6QB70ww_7YC4r0sI2tydTRMpAerzW8FBUyR-btR7sl4IXnsBq0Y92rAPDC-2Dux8TzlBGklx7xeWijlyjrjBamJHxOKovpud0oc0eXzPK8N659o_2rEmkijiawA%3D%3D) As Jane keeps traveling the state, she will continue to spread her America First message and continue to prove that she is the grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=9076422e0afa4ee189b234c6ac4dc604&_t=sYE4g7mAhgni7NQn57Z0zl96x9UvldpqBeYEX7ErlBaTk9gETV9oZEH-ZD9rqlvHjFo9n2MwDZcGnfa4ZF2Q_6YXJO0ev-6djwocgdVnvrrYbkyRgpfDdOK7IDSVywajhSvsEI_-1eOH-HnnYsWJNIxqWflpOzr_a5TyTKUQZJM%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9076422e0afa4ee189b234c6ac4dc604&_e=PTnS-8dcrvyENUu4LAaXNvFet0uLtZ92gsgIG2yfhMj_MVINeANxpJ_z5bNUVoGvuMLEqzEeSETB83BMRd25o05Jwez4dgaV3ro3nKOXvG1_26S8QZWEI_b_djo_lzfjMtQzox2LQmkS4X-9xAiCU0FDz2YYt_u086zBo_lJ13nH8mHe7Pm1r0A0-2EDFbJjWJJVO0ML1AoHipPCzzfabuHNGC_-DT4XlaDr2sbFd5b_EjFjTXsYGur0Vlq-j3gdgMQzjxxBo0o3hsj7kKAcMegLQTJQtRYRxRyrIub-DNk%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9076422e0afa4ee189b234c6ac4dc604&_e=FRehSBSxKTlknoE6NHKjXJs5EV5IJsCaERNzEaRy4PgH_l2yrCl9Fs-jo0K1Ni6eOkYu3fiwTGHDk4A989AGEPPd0ag554bmfrdKve55xuarL5CxED3--FU5SzFFvd4CH0nZm9WW1xUFMIswbhljSzzIZnDaQSRKqGeakiKvUsQfQKcQkNGVDqnSFm78lb5VZsWsT6tYXwo6P6-qRt5_R70L02yzKdGKlBRRwk0nZE3Rjv4ytwiHe08irCeD_cuZlCRl33g_frUKF9S2z28Aqg%3D%3D)

Jane returned to Ashtabula County on Sunday for the Ashtabula County Republican Women’s Club Annual Picnic! The Greene County Republican Party hosted Jane at their Patriotic Pot Luck and Politicians on Monday evening. On Wednesday, Jane joined the Putnam County Republican Party to pass out BBQ Chicken Dinners for their annual event. It was great to see Putnam County Chairman Tony Schroeder and all the great patriots in Putnam County. The Forge Leadership Network works to train and educate young conservatives in national and international politics and professional development. Jane was proud to join them for their Showcase Reception where she shared why and how she got involved in conservative politics and why our country needs strong, young conservatives like them to get involved and fight for our values. This afternoon, Jane joined Ohio Supreme Court Justice Pat Fischer for his first ever Fifth Fischer Friday event in Hamilton County. Timken: Ohio, America First The Mount Vernon News covered Jane’s America First campaign this week. Jane spoke about the major issues she sees as she travels the state. “I travel around the state of Ohio, and I talk to so many businesses that can't find enough people to come back to work. And many manufacturing-based companies do not have enough people to actually produce the products that they need to sell to their customers. Which then in turn causes supply chain issues which also contributes to our inflationary situation right now,” she told the Mount Vernon News. Ohio had a labor shortage problem before the pandemic, with many job openings but not enough workers with the required skills. She wants to redirect the focus to training kids in high school and community colleges to match the skills needed in their local communities.” As Jane keeps traveling the state, she will continue to spread her America First message and continue to prove that she is the grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

I don't mean to alarm you, but our Majority is in deep trouble.

**1** \-- Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back power for good.
**2** \-- They've broken **FOUR** monthly fundraising records in a row.
**3** \-- And they now have **$11 MILLION** more in the bank than my House Democrats.

This isn't my first rodeo, so believe me when I say: **That kind of advantage could spell defeat for our House Majority if we don 't respond in a BIG way.**

That's why I had no choice but to set an ambitious $225,OOO End of Month goal -- and with the stakes this high, failure is just simply not an option.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We realized something…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s how we got there.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210730-2171-header&t=1&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)
Peter,
I was checking some end-of-month fundraising reports for John last night when I realized something:
**If 1 in every ~5 people who received this email donated even just $5, we would *literally* reach our $102,769 fundraising goal today, with money to spare.**(I’ve always been great at math).
Here’s how I got there:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25628?refcode=em20210730-2171&t=2&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)
[**_With this in mind, will you please make your first $5 donation to our campaign before tomorrow's deadline? In order to keep our campaign growing and resume our field + organizing operations, we’ve got to raise at least $102,769 before tomorrow, July 31 at 11:59 p.m._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25628?refcode=em20210730-2171&t=3&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25628?refcode=em20210730-2171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)**
Remember, we’re building our campaign the right way — no corporate PAC money and no special interests. Just people. We’re building a winning campaign one donation at a time (and our average donation this quarter is just $20.92).
Even if it’s just $5, anything you’re able to give has a direct and immediate impact on meeting our fundraising goal (you can trust me, I did the math).
[**_So if you’re able to, can you please make a donation today? Not everyone who reads this will donate, but I'm really hoping you'll be among the ones who dig deep and contribute what you can._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25628?refcode=em20210730-2171&t=23&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)
Thanks for everything,
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. We did the math: **If 1 in every 5 or so people who receive this email chip in, we can close the gap on our organizing budget _today._** So if you've been waiting for the right moment to donate for the first time, now is that time. [** _With just a day left before our July deadline, please donate anything you can to help send John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25628?refcode=em20210730-2171&t=24&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210730-2171-footer&t=25&refcode2=2171_434096_GX5LEu&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2171%2E434096%2EGX5LEu)

#

**FIRST:** Gabby personally reached out to you to ask if you could make a contribution to our 10,000 contribution July fundraising deadline.
**THEN:** We explained the three most important reasons for donating this month and why it’s crucial that we have your support before Saturday.
**NOW:** We’re only 1,237 contributions away from achieving our goal and we’re reaching out to see if you can add a donation before our deadline tomorrow at midnight.
We need to end this month in a good spot, because we are currently facing strong opposition from the NRA and NSSF while we are so close to passing universal background checks. **So before we go any further we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal?
