subject: Biden is making gas prices spike ⛽
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Rrm98KL0Ki33CorTyhd1Pw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi5vZkP0UgYWJmZWM4NWE3ODE0MWY2ZWU3MTVjNjdmNzNiNDIzMGVEPWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nYXNwcmljZXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphBGRxBGEP-PutUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Peter,
Unless you live in one of America's largest cities, you need to drive a car to get around. Cars are how we get to work, the grocery store, our kids' schools, everywhere. So rising gas prices function like taxes, and there's no way to avoid paying them.
That's why the Biden Administration's anti-oil policies are hurting everyday Americans. Biden has made it clear that he will make it harder for American companies to drill and refine oil, imposing a massive financial burden on the middle class.
[>> RUSH IN $35 TO STOP BIDEN'S ANTI-OIL AGENDA! <<](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Rrm98KL0Ki33CorTyhd1Pw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi5vZkP0UgYWJmZWM4NWE3ODE0MWY2ZWU3MTVjNjdmNzNiNDIzMGVEPWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nYXNwcmljZXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphBGRxBGEP-PutUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
What Democrats like Biden don't understand is that their heavy-handed environmental policies have real and negative consequences. The choice isn't, as they like to say, between enriching oil tycoons and protecting the environment. The choice is between easing up on extreme job-killing regulations they are imposing, and forcing people to pay $4 a gallon at the pump!
**$4 or more per gallon, that's what they're paying in California _right now_ , thanks to the same failed progressive policies Biden is attempting to impose on the entire country: strict bans on drilling, extreme carbon emissions standards, and a mandated phasing out of gasoline-powered cars.**
Most Americans don't want to live in California's version of America. _That's why about 90% of us don't, and why more and more Californians leave every day._ But Democrats are always trying to take that state's failed progressive schemes and force them onto the entire U.S. **That's why gas prices are rising across the country - the Biden Administration is Californizing our country, and American consumers are paying the price.**
**Don't California my America!**
[>> STOP GAS PRICE INFLATION! <<](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Rrm98KL0Ki33CorTyhd1Pw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi5vZkP0UgYWJmZWM4NWE3ODE0MWY2ZWU3MTVjNjdmNzNiNDIzMGVEPWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nYXNwcmljZXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphBGRxBGEP-PutUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
The only reason Biden is able to impose this foolhardy progressive vision is because his party enjoys total control of the Federal Government. **Without a Democrat House and with a divided Senate, Biden would be unable to continue his attempts to drive gas prices sky high.**
Look, I'm from Texas. I understand the real impact of Biden's failed energy policies and know the horror that will be caused by AOC's Green New Deal. **Jobs will be killed, prices will go up, and real families will be hurt.**
We have to take back Congress in 2022! With Republicans in power in the House and Senate, we can stand up to Biden's disastrous policies. [Can I count on you to help make Joe Biden stop wasting Americans' hard-earned dollars?](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Rrm98KL0Ki33CorTyhd1Pw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi5vZkP0UgYWJmZWM4NWE3ODE0MWY2ZWU3MTVjNjdmNzNiNDIzMGVEPWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nYXNwcmljZXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphBGRxBGEP-PutUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

Friend, Faith, freedom, and hard work. These values are what make Kansas a fantastic place to live, work, and raise a family - and those are the values I plan to defend** when I’m elected governor. Kansas needs someone who will bring common-sense conservative leadership to this state. We can’t let coastal elites and liberal special interest groups run us into the ground any longer: that’s why meeting our monthly fundraising goal is so crucial. Our monthly fundraising deadline is coming up, and we need to keep this momentum going if we’re going to defeat the Left, friend. Can I count on your support? As your Attorney General, I’ve led the fight against human trafficking, I’ve backed toughened penalties for stealing taxpayer dollars, and I’ve worked hard to combat elder abuse. If given the opportunity to serve in the governor’s office, I’ll continue to fight for Kansas’ small businesses, the vulnerable, and the elderly. I'm ready to turn the page on the disappointment of the 2018 election that put Laura Kelly in charge. I'm fighting to make her a one-term governor** in 2022. Are you with me, friend? name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m on a mission to RETIRE Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
That's why I'm running for Governor.
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1778?t=6&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy) Hi Team! It’s Nikki Fried. I’m Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture, and I’m running for Governor to break Florida’s rigged system and defeat Ron DeSantis.

Here are the facts: Ron DeSantis is a Trump Republican who spends most of his time preparing to run for President.

**_As Florida’s only statewide elected Democrat, I know how to win this race and stop DeSantis. But I need your help to compete with his army of Republican megadonors from across the country._**

[**Will you split $3 between my campaign and the incredible team at Ron Be Gone as we work to RETIRE Ron DeSantis? We need to raise $25,000 before our deadline on Saturday. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1780?t=8&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1797?t=15&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1798?t=16&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1799?t=17&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
When I ran for office for the first time in 2018, no one thought a Democrat from Miami could become Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture.

**When people underestimate me, I win. Then, I get to work.**

As Commissioner of Agriculture, I’ve stood up for farmworkers, legalized hemp, and taken on the NRA.

Now I’m running for Governor to break Florida’s corrupt system and try something new. Together, we can build a state that works for US.

**But first, we’ll need to defeat Ron DeSantis.**

[**Please-- join us. Split a $3 donation between my campaign and Ron Be Gone right now to stop Ron DeSantis! Ron has a head start, so we’ll need to raise $25,000 by Saturday. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1780?t=19&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1797?t=25&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1798?t=26&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/1799?t=27&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy)
I know we can do this together. Florida is counting on you.

In gratitude,

Nikki Fried
_Democratic Candidate for Florida Governor_
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=386%2E564421%2E74etTy).**

name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: A look at our finance spreadsheet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I want to give you a quick update.
#
Hi,
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and I want to give you a quick update on where we stand. Here’s a look at our finance spreadsheet:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7695?refcode=em20210730-300&t=1&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)
Over the last few days, we’ve made real progress on reaching our goal of $20,000 from emails like this one, but **with less than 48 left we’re still $1,050 short.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach our goal before 11:59 PM ET tomorrow? Erica doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC or fossil fuel money — so she’s counting on folks reading this email to pitch in!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7695?refcode=em20210730-300&t=2&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7695?refcode=em20210730-300&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)**
Republicans are raising an unprecedented amount of money — and what’s more, outside groups are already spending millions of dollars to buy this race for Donald Trump’s very own hand-picked candidate. **So when we tell you this goal is too important to fall behind on****, we mean it.**
Right now, we’re building a grassroots movement powerful enough to defeat the GOP, but we still have a TON of work to do to spread Erica’s story and our vision for a North Carolina that works for everyone.
Reaching our goal will ensure that a scrappy, people-powered campaign like ours has what it takes to build a massive, diverse, working-class coalition that can win this race and transform politics as we know it.
[**So, please, chip in $5 or any amount you can afford to put your support behind our progressive, people-powered movement and help us raise $1,050 before 11:59 PM ET tomorrow.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7695?refcode=em20210730-300&t=22&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)
Let’s do this!
Jayla
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210730-300-footer&t=23&refcode2=300_3698_HyW7Zd&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=300%2E3698%2EHyW7Zd)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Ducey?=
subject: AZ economic boom ahead 📈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ducey for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,
---
| Leaders across the country recognize how Arizona is leading the way with smart economic policies. The recently passed tax cuts will make taxes fairer, flatter, and simpler so that citizens get to keep more of what they earn.

Here's what they are saying:
---
|
---
| **Never mind the haters, Arizona. More boom times are ahead, thanks to Ducey's bold tax cuts**

_By: Eric Knott, Chairman of the Arizona Small Business Association_

When he first ran for governor in 2014, Doug Ducey pledged to lower income tax rates as close to zero as possible.

He’d made modest progress on that claim – until now. But with the recent passage of the flat tax, we can now see real progress on that score, and we also have a fuller understanding of the broad view of Ducey’s approach to economics.
---
| [CONTINUE READING](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=5e45962be6&e=55d4e2f84a "CONTINUE READING")
---
|
---
|
---
| **Arizona Tax Reform is a National Model**

_By: Tim Phillips and Grover Norquist_

As America recovers from shutdowns imposed in response to COVID-19, many states are experiencing surges in tax revenues unthinkable a year ago. Even so, the federal government has provided trillions in unnecessary spending and "stimulus" funds—even with a number of states experiencing surpluses before they received any federal dollars.

While some legislators see these windfalls as an opportunity to waste money on unnecessary programs, Arizona lawmakers have wisely chosen to reduce the state tax burden.

---
| [CONTINUE READING](https://dougducey.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf4fbf102e325035a83ef3427&id=7845a50b86&e=55d4e2f84a "CONTINUE READING")

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Hello, | Leaders across the country recognize how Arizona is leading the way with smart economic policies. The recently passed tax cuts will make taxes fairer, flatter, and simpler so that citizens get to keep more of what they earn. Here's what they are saying: | | Never mind the haters, Arizona. More boom times are ahead, thanks to Ducey's bold tax cuts By: Eric Knott, Chairman of the Arizona Small Business Association When he first ran for governor in 2014, Doug Ducey pledged to lower income tax rates as close to zero as possible. He’d made modest progress on that claim – until now. But with the recent passage of the flat tax, we can now see real progress on that score, and we also have a fuller understanding of the broad view of Ducey’s approach to economics. | "CONTINUE READING" | | | Arizona Tax Reform is a National Model By: Tim Phillips and Grover Norquist As America recovers from shutdowns imposed in response to COVID-19, many states are experiencing surges in tax revenues unthinkable a year ago. Even so, the federal government has provided trillions in unnecessary spending and "stimulus" funds—even with a number of states experiencing surpluses before they received any federal dollars. While some legislators see these windfalls as an opportunity to waste money on unnecessary programs, Arizona lawmakers have wisely chosen to reduce the state tax burden. | "CONTINUE READING" | | Please help us get the word out! body:
Biden is putting the final nail in the coffin by extending... | |
---
[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=bb2fb8086fff4da483db60321de78240&_e=gZ1W0SOEnyJuZ5vsKw6DcKYKU2B4hCoP-oOj-R4WBQGUn4urLjlbQczyU3cABw7rFvfgA6G6ZQ_lV8A244HO6LsKW8xfJmWi_Y8d1jgGqCPgr_ZaSFIVz3agCwIWZn6BtdxqQ-4s412j7E3avR6xEU--nXEgrLQbuJEi0DWOp3dq0DTVvigrZkZiE7hsiZk1MLLrmulKP_3fgFMBWgGvmyUq1AzZvVKbX2uwLQHAP1AAHPCRYasf_Rrja5xDqmJ9ku575hfJY4Bt9PhNDdO8SPLxl1weiJajGqqKrdC6IfDBz0UlWQK8eN1j1g27VFkRgxrMMhsZjKvIV6R4eBbW16GNS999fKivhrypKg9rPrYEfXqEEUgAC1eNiFgMt4nRK0rH95ECGXz6tEKGZIH8LAbObJL2IbX5bxfJi9Cfmzb-4ILkSvt1_5syP7QlEP9Y6N5v5wh-ni89PE-kT_e5WcTTBAoWJzf7pXX_rJA775Ft31tkeD6IgnDBg9r_Wdjz)
|
---
PeterーAndrew here.

I heard my team reached out about Biden’s anti-small business agenda.

For over a year, small businesses were forced to shutter their businesses, navigate ever-changing restrictions, and face fines from out-of-control Democrat governors.

After surviving all of that, Biden is putting the final nail in the coffin by extending unemployment endlessly for young, healthy, and able-bodied Americans.

**Joe Biden is knowingly killing small businesses, and he doesn’t care.**

Why should he care? He’s a lifelong politician and represents everything that is wrong with Washington.

That’s why if we’re going to save our small businesses, we need to start fighting back. _**This is our last stand to save American small businesses!**_
